 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[extTransactionId](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetailsResponse.html#extTransactionId)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[initiator](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetailsResponse.html#initiator)
 ( _[UserPartyEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/UserPartyEnum.html)
_ )

[inquiryClosureDate](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetailsResponse.html#inquiryClosureDate)
 ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ )

[inquiryContentOnHold](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetailsResponse.html#inquiryContentOnHold)
 ( _[boolean](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#boolean)
_ )

[inquiryDetails](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetailsResponse.html#inquiryDetails)
 ( _[InquiryDetails](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetails.html)
_ )

[inquiryHistoryDetails](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetailsResponse.html#inquiryHistoryDetails)
 ( _[ClaimHistoryResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ClaimHistoryResponse.html)
_ )

[inquiryId](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetailsResponse.html#inquiryId)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[inquiryQuantity](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetailsResponse.html#inquiryQuantity)
 ( _[integer](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#integer)
_ )

[itemDetails](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetailsResponse.html#itemDetails)
 ( _[ItemDetails](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ItemDetails.html)
_ )

[itemId](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetailsResponse.html#itemId)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[returnDetails](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetailsResponse.html#returnDetails)
 ( _[ReturnAddress](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnAddress.html)
_ )

[sellerMakeItRightByDate](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetailsResponse.html#sellerMakeItRightByDate)
 ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ )

[shippingCost](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetailsResponse.html#shippingCost)
 ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ )

[state](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetailsResponse.html#state)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[status](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetailsResponse.html#status)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[transactionId](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetailsResponse.html#transactionId)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[viewPPTrasanctionUrl](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetailsResponse.html#viewPPTrasanctionUrl)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

  
  

claimAmount ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container displays the dollar value of the order line item associated with the inquiry, which is generally the amount of the refund that the buyer will receive if the buyer is looking for a refund, or if the seller voluntarily refunds the buyer.  
  
**Note:** There's a possibility that this value can be inaccurate if the buyer passed in an inaccurate value into the **claimQuantity** field when the inquiry was created.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#claimAmount)
 to learn which calls use claimAmount.

  

creationReason ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The enumeration value in this field indicates why the buyer created an INR inquiry for the line item.  
  
The list of enumeration values that may be returned in this field are defined in the [INRCreationReasonEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order//devzone/post-order/types/INRCreationReasonEnum.html)
 type definition.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#creationReason)
 to learn which calls use creationReason.

  

extTransactionId ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This string value is the unique identifier of the payment transaction for the order. This field will only be returned if the payment transaction happened outside of eBay's system.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#extTransactionId)
 to learn which calls use extTransactionId.

  

initiator ( _[UserPartyEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/UserPartyEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The party who created this inquiry. In most cases, this value will be `BUYER`.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#initiator)
 to learn which calls use initiator.

  

inquiryClosureDate ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The timestamp in this container indicates when the inquiry was closed.  
  
This container will only be returned if the INR inquiry has been closed.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#inquiryClosureDate)
 to learn which calls use inquiryClosureDate.

  

inquiryContentOnHold ( _[boolean](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#boolean)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This field indicates the item content related to the inquiry is hidden (the respective content is not returned). This field is returned as 'true' if the corresponding inquiry content is on hold due to eBay policy violation; false otherwise.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#inquiryContentOnHold)
 to learn which calls use inquiryContentOnHold.

  

inquiryDetails ( _[InquiryDetails](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetails.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container provides details on the specified INR inquiry.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#inquiryDetails)
 to learn which calls use inquiryDetails.

  

inquiryHistoryDetails ( _[ClaimHistoryResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ClaimHistoryResponse.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container consists of information about the events and actions that have occurred throughout the course of the specified INR inquiry.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#inquiryHistoryDetails)
 to learn which calls use inquiryHistoryDetails.

  

inquiryId ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The unique identifier of the INR inquiry for which details have been retrieved. All information returned in the response is relevant to this specific INR inquiry.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#inquiryId)
 to learn which calls use inquiryId.

  

inquiryQuantity ( _[integer](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#integer)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This integer is the quantity of the line item purchased by the buyer. This value is the same value passed into the **claimQuantity** field when the INR inquiry was created. If the **claimQuantity** field was omitted when the INR inquiry was created, this value defaults to `1`.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#inquiryQuantity)
 to learn which calls use inquiryQuantity.

  

itemDetails ( _[ItemDetails](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ItemDetails.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container consists of details related to the item associated with the INR inquiry, including the item title, price, and the URL of the gallery picture.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#itemDetails)
 to learn which calls use itemDetails.

  

itemId ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The unique identifier of the eBay listing where the line item was purchased. This field is used in conjunction with the **transactionId** field to identify a line item that is associated with the INR inquiry.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#itemId)
 to learn which calls use itemId.

  

returnDetails ( _[ReturnAddress](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnAddress.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container consists of information related to a buyer returning an order to the seller, including the seller's return address and the RMA number (if applicable). This container is only returned under the following circumstances:

*   The INR inquiry was escalated to a case.
*   The seller already shipped the order line item
*   The buyer's desired outcome upon creating the INR inquiry was to get a full refund for the missing order line item

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#returnDetails)
 to learn which calls use returnDetails.

  

sellerMakeItRightByDate ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The timestamp in this container indicates when the seller is expected to resolve this INR inquiry.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#sellerMakeItRightByDate)
 to learn which calls use sellerMakeItRightByDate.

  

shippingCost ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows the cost of shipping the order line item associated with this inquiry.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#shippingCost)
 to learn which calls use shippingCost.

  

state ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration value indicates the current state of the INR inquiry.  
  
The list of enumeration values that may be returned in this field are defined in the [InquiryStateEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order//devzone/post-order/types/InquiryStateEnum.html)
 type definition.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#state)
 to learn which calls use state.

  

status ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration value indicates the current status of the INR inquiry.  
  
The list of enumeration values that may be returned in this field are defined in the [InquiryStatusEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order//devzone/post-order/types/InquiryStatusEnum.html)
 type definition.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#status)
 to learn which calls use status.

  

transactionId ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The unique identifier of the purchase transaction. This value is created right when the buyer is committed to buying the item, whether that buyer uses a 'Buy it Now' capability, is the winning bidder of an auction, or the buyer's Best Offer is accepted by the seller. This field is used in conjunction with the **itemId** field to identify the line item that is associated with the INR inquiry.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#transactionId)
 to learn which calls use transactionId.

  

viewPPTrasanctionUrl ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

**THIS FIELD IS DEPRECATED**.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#viewPPTrasanctionUrl)
 to learn which calls use viewPPTrasanctionUrl.

---

# NumericValue - API Reference - Product API

eBay Product APIVersion 1.6.0

*   [Features Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/guides/ebayfeatures/index.html)
    
*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/Concepts/ProductAPIGuide.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/Concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/Concepts/LandAPIRef.html)
    
*   [Tutorials](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/HowTo/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

NumericValue
============

This class holds a numeric value

Type that uses NumericValue:

[Value](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/Value.html)

Calls that use NumericValue:

[findProducts](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/findProducts.html)
, [getProductCompatibilities](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/getProductCompatibilities.html)
, [getProductDetails](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/getProductDetails.html)

Fields
------

unitOfMeasurement ( _[token](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#token)
_ ) [\[0..1\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

Unit of measure for a numeric value.

**Allowed values:**

bps

Bits per second. A unit of data transmission.

kbps

Kilobits per second. A unit of data transmission.

bit

Binary digit. A unit of information storage.

byte

An ordered collection of bits. A unit of information storage equal to 8 bits in most contexts.

kb

Kilobit. A unit of information storage equal to 1024 bits.

MB

Megabyte. A unit of information storage equal to one million bytes.

mW

Megawatt. A unit of power equal to one million watts.

W

Watt. The base SI unit of power.

Hz

Hertz. A unit of frequency equal to one cycle per second.

kHz

Kilohertz. A unit of frequency equal to 1,000 cycles per second.

m

Meter. The base unit of distance.

mm

Megameter. A unit of distance equal to one million meters.

rph

Revolutions per hour. A unit of frequency.

hr

Hour. A unit of time equal to 3,600 seconds.

min

Minute. A unit of time equal to 60 seconds.

ms

Microsecond. A unit of time equal to one millionth of a second.

ns

Nanosecond. A unit of time equal to 10\-9 seconds.

sec

Seconds. The base unit of time.

g

Grams. A unit of mass equal to one one-thousandth of the SI base unit, the kilogram.

lbs

Pounds. The base Imperial unit of mass.

The allowed units of measure do not apply to all numeric values. For example, when specifying the number of doors, unitOfMeasurement is not needed.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/fieldindex.html#unitOfMeasurement)
 to learn which calls use unitOfMeasurement.

  

value ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[1\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

A numeric value. For example, physical dimensions of a product, such as height or weight, are specified as nummeric values.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/fieldindex.html#value)
 to learn which calls use value.

---

# Notes - API Reference - Product API

eBay Product APIVersion 1.6.0

*   [Features Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/guides/ebayfeatures/index.html)
    
*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/Concepts/ProductAPIGuide.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/Concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/Concepts/LandAPIRef.html)
    
*   [Tutorials](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/HowTo/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

Notes
=====

Container for notes related to a product in the eBay catalog.

Type that uses Notes:

[Product](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/Product.html)

Calls that use Notes:

[findProducts](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/findProducts.html)
, [getProductCompatibilities](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/getProductCompatibilities.html)
, [getProductDetails](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/getProductDetails.html)

Field
-----

noteDetails ( _[PropertyValue](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/PropertyValue.html)
_ ) [\[0..\*\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

Additional comments about the product in the form of name-value pairs.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/fieldindex.html#noteDetails)
 to learn which calls use noteDetails.

---

# RefundInfoType - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

RefundInfoType
==============

This type is used by the **refundInfo** container, which provides detailed information on the estimated and actual refund amounts.

Type that uses RefundInfoType:

[ReturnDetailType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnDetailType.html)

Calls that use RefundInfoType:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)

Fields
------

actualRefundDetail ( _[ActualRefundDetailType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ActualRefundDetailType.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows the itemized refund information after the seller issues a refund to the buyer. This container is only returned if the seller has issued a refund to the buyer. Until the refund is actually successfully processed, only information on the estimated refund may be seen in the **estimatedRefundDetail** container.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#actualRefundDetail)
 to learn which calls use actualRefundDetail.

  

estimatedRefundDetail ( _[EstimatedRefundDetailType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/EstimatedRefundDetailType.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows estimated refund information for the buyer. There will be one **itemizedRefundDetail** container returned under this container for each refund fee type (such as purchase price and original shipping).

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#estimatedRefundDetail)
 to learn which calls use estimatedRefundDetail.

---

# DepositDetails - API Reference - Business Policies Management API

eBay Business Policies Management APIVersion 1.0.0

*   [Features Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/guides/features-guide/default.html#features-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/Concepts/BusinessPoliciesAPIGuide.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/Concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/index.html)
    
*   [Tutorials](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/HowTo/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

DepositDetails
==============

Type that defines the **depositDetails** container, which is used by the seller to specify amounts and due dates for deposits and full payment on eBay Motors (US and CA) vehicle listings. The **depositDetails** container is conditionally required if the the payment policy is for eBay Motors (US and CA) vehicles listings (**categoryGroup.name=MOTORS\_VEHICLE**).

Type that uses DepositDetails:

[PaymentInfo](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/PaymentInfo.html)

Calls that use DepositDetails:

[addSellerProfile](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/addSellerProfile.html)
, [getSellerProfiles](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/getSellerProfiles.html)
, [setSellerProfile](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/setSellerProfile.html)

Fields
------

daysToFullPayment ( _[int](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#int)
_ ) [\[0..1\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This integer value indicates the number of days that a buyer has to make their full payment to the seller and close the remaining balance on a motor vehicle transaction. This container must be specified for motor vehicles listings. Valid values are '3', '7' (default), '10', and '14'.  
  
In order for a buyer to make a full payment on a US or CA motor vehicle, at least one of the following **acceptedPaymentMethod** values must be specified for the corresponding payment policy:

*   CashOnPickup
*   LoanCheck
*   MOCC (money order or cashier's check)
*   PersonalCheck

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/fieldindex.html#daysToFullPayment)
 to learn which calls use daysToFullPayment.

  

depositAmount ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/Amount.html)
 ([double](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#double)
)_ ) [\[0..1\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This value indicates the initial deposit amount required from the buyer in order to purchase a motor vehicle. This value can be as high as $2,000.00 if immediate payment is not required, and up to $500.00 if immediate payment is required. This container is only applicable if the **categoryGroup.name**field is set to 'MOTORS\_VEHICLE'.  
  
If not specified, this value defaults to '0.0'. If this value is specified, the seller must also specify an **hoursToDeposit** value.  
  
The deposit amount appears in the shipping, payment details and return policy sections of the View Item page.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/fieldindex.html#depositAmount)
 to learn which calls use depositAmount.

  

hoursToDeposit ( _[int](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#int)
_ ) [\[0..1\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This integer value indicates the number of hours that a buyer has (after he/she commits to buy) to make an initial deposit to the seller as a down payment on a motor vehicle. Valid values are '24', '48' (default), and '72'.  
  
The deposit amount is specified in the **depositAmount** field. If not specified, the **depositAmount** value defaults to '0.0', in which case, a deposit on the vehicle is not required.  
**Note:** The **hoursToDeposit** value is overridden if the seller has set the motor vehicle listing to require immediate payment. If the listing requires immediate payment, the buyer must pay the deposit immediately in order to be eligible to purchase the motor vehicle.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/fieldindex.html#hoursToDeposit)
 to learn which calls use hoursToDeposit.

---

# RlspTypeEnum - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

RlspTypeEnum
============

This enumerated type defines the values that can be returned for an Australian-based shipping service.

Type that uses RlspTypeEnum:

[ResponseHistoryAttributesType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ResponseHistoryAttributesType.html)

Calls that use one or more values of RlspTypeEnum:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| AU\_PARCELPOINT | This enumeration value indicates that the shipping service is a Parcel Point shipping service. |
| AU\_PARCELPOINT\_AUPOST | This enumeration value indicates that the shipping service is a Parcel Point/Australia Post shipping service used for low coverage/remote areas. |
| AU\_PARCELPOINT\_AUPOST\_DROP | This enumeration value indicates that the shipping service is a Parcel Point/Australia Post shipping service with dropoff. |
| AU\_PARCELPOINT\_COURIER\_PICKUP | This enumeration value indicates that the shipping service is a Parcel Point shipping service with courier pickup. |
| UNKNOWN | This enumeration value indicates that the shipping serviceis not known. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# Refund_MoneyMovementStatusEnum - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

Refund\_MoneyMovementStatusEnum
===============================

This enumerated type defines the possible values that can be returned for the status of a buyer refund.

Types that use Refund\_MoneyMovementStatusEnum:

[ActualRefundDetailType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ActualRefundDetailType.html)
, [DecideReturnResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DecideReturnResponse.html)
, [IssueRefundResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/IssueRefundResponse.html)

Calls that use one or more values of Refund\_MoneyMovementStatusEnum:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/decide POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid_decide__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/issue\_refund POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid_issue_refund__post.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| FAILED | This enumeration value indicates that the buyer refund transaction failed. |
| PENDING | This enumeration value indicates that the buyer refund is in the pending state. |
| REQUESTED | This enumeration value indicates that a refund has been requested by the buyer. |
| SUCCESS | This enumeration value indicates that the buyer refund was successful. |
| UNKNOWN | This enumeration value indicates that the result of the buyer refund transaction is unknown. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# PaymentProfileList - API Reference - Business Policies Management API

eBay Business Policies Management APIVersion 1.0.0

*   [Features Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/guides/features-guide/default.html#features-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/Concepts/BusinessPoliciesAPIGuide.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/Concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/index.html)
    
*   [Tutorials](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/HowTo/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

PaymentProfileList
==================

Container consisting of one or more payment policies that match the input criteria in a **getSellerProfiles** call request.

Type that uses PaymentProfileList:

[GetSellerProfilesResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/GetSellerProfilesResponse.html)

Call that uses PaymentProfileList:

[getSellerProfiles](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/getSellerProfiles.html)

Field
-----

PaymentProfile ( _[PaymentProfile](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/PaymentProfile.html)
_ ) [\[1..\*\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

Container consisting of details for a specific payment policy. A **PaymentProfile** container is returned in **getSellerProfiles** for each payment policy that matches the input criteria.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/fieldindex.html#PaymentProfile)
 to learn which calls use PaymentProfile.

---

# ProvideLabelRequest - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ProvideLabelRequest
===================

The base request type of the **POST /post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/add\_shipping\_label** method.

Call that uses ProvideLabelRequest:

[/post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/add\_shipping\_label POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid_add_shipping_label__post.html)

Fields
------

[carrierEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ProvideLabelRequest.html#carrierEnum)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[carrierName](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ProvideLabelRequest.html#carrierName)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[comments](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ProvideLabelRequest.html#comments)
 ( _[Text](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Text.html)
_ )

[fileId](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ProvideLabelRequest.html#fileId)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[forwardShippingLabelProvided](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ProvideLabelRequest.html#forwardShippingLabelProvided)
 ( _[boolean](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#boolean)
_ )

[labelAction](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ProvideLabelRequest.html#labelAction)
 ( _[LabelActionEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/LabelActionEnum.html)
_ )

[labelSentDate](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ProvideLabelRequest.html#labelSentDate)
 ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ )

[noLabelReason](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ProvideLabelRequest.html#noLabelReason)
 ( _[NoSellerUploadLabelReasonEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/NoSellerUploadLabelReasonEnum.html)
_ )

[returnLabelCost](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ProvideLabelRequest.html#returnLabelCost)
 ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ )

[trackingNumber](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ProvideLabelRequest.html#trackingNumber)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

  
  

carrierEnum ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

One of the values defined in the [ShippingCarrierEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order//devzone/post-order/types/ShippingCarrierEnum.html)
 type definition must be used in this field to indicate the shipping carrier that will be used to ship the return item. This field is conditionally required if the **POST /post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/add\_shipping\_label** method is being used to initiate an eBay shipping label. Otherwise, the **carrierName** field can be used to indicate which shipping carrier will be used.  
  
Note that the [ShippingCarrierEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order//devzone/post-order/types/ShippingCarrierEnum.html)
 type defines enumeration values for some popular shipping carriers for the US, UK, Germany, Canada, and Australia, but it is not a complete global list.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#carrierEnum)
 to learn which calls use carrierEnum.

  

carrierName ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This field is used to show the name of the shipping carrier.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#carrierName)
 to learn which calls use carrierName.

  

comments ( _[Text](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Text.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container can be used to include any applicable comments about the shipping label.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#comments)
 to learn which calls use comments.

  

fileId ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The unique ID of a file attached to the return request. This field may be used if the seller has associated a shipping label related file to the return request.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#fileId)
 to learn which calls use fileId.

  

forwardShippingLabelProvided ( _[boolean](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#boolean)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This field should be provided and set to `true` if the seller has already provided the buyer with a return shipping label. This field is generally provided if the **labelAction** value is set to `MARK_AS_SENT`.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#forwardShippingLabelProvided)
 to learn which calls use forwardShippingLabelProvided.

  

labelAction ( _[LabelActionEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/LabelActionEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This required field indicates what action is being taken with the **POST /post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/add\_shipping\_label** request. Based on what value is supplied here, the **noLabelReason**, **forwardShippingLabelProvided**, and **labelId** fields may become conditionally required.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#labelAction)
 to learn which calls use labelAction.

  

labelSentDate ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The timestamp in this container indicates when the shipping label was sent to the buyer or seller.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#labelSentDate)
 to learn which calls use labelSentDate.

  

noLabelReason ( _[NoSellerUploadLabelReasonEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/NoSellerUploadLabelReasonEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This field is conditionally required if the **labelAction** value is set to `NO_LABEL`. If no shipping label is being provided, the seller must state the reason why through this field. The supported value for this field can be found in the [NoSellerUploadLabelReasonEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order//devzone/post-order/types/NoSellerUploadLabelReasonEnum.html)
 type definition.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#noLabelReason)
 to learn which calls use noLabelReason.

  

returnLabelCost ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows the cost of the return shipping label.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#returnLabelCost)
 to learn which calls use returnLabelCost.

  

trackingNumber ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The tracking number on the shipping label. If providing the tracking number, the shipping carrier must also be provided through the **carrierEnum** field.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#trackingNumber)
 to learn which calls use trackingNumber.

---

# EscalationEligibilityInfo - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

EscalationEligibilityInfo
=========================

This type is used to indicate if the buyer or seller is eligible to escalate a return request to a case.

Type that uses EscalationEligibilityInfo:

[EscalationInfoType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/EscalationInfoType.html)

Calls that use EscalationEligibilityInfo:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/search GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return_search__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)

Fields
------

eligible ( _[boolean](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#boolean)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This boolean value indicates whether or not the buyer or seller is eligible to escalate the return request to a case. If the value is `true`, the time window in which the buyer or seller can escalate the case is found in the **startTime** and **endTime** containers.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#eligible)
 to learn which calls use eligible.

  

endTime ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The timestamp in this container provides the deadline in which the buyer or seller may escalate the return request to a case. As soon as this time expires, the buyer or seller may no longer escalate the return request to a case. This field will not be returned if the value of the **eligible** field is `false`.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#endTime)
 to learn which calls use endTime.

  

startTime ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The timestamp in this container provides the earliest date in which the buyer or seller may escalate the return request to a case. As soon as this time arrives, up until the time shown in the **end** field, the buyer or seller is eligible to escalate the return request to a case. This field will not be returned if the value of the **eligible** field is `false`.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#startTime)
 to learn which calls use startTime.

---

# SortOrder - API Reference - Product API

eBay Product APIVersion 1.6.0

*   [Features Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/guides/ebayfeatures/index.html)
    
*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/Concepts/ProductAPIGuide.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/Concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/Concepts/LandAPIRef.html)
    
*   [Tutorials](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/HowTo/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

SortOrder
=========

Sort order input for the result set. Any of the searchable properties can be used for property name and order can be either Ascending or Descending.

Types that use SortOrder:

[CompatibilitySort](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/CompatibilitySort.html)
, [ProductRequest](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/ProductRequest.html)

Calls that use SortOrder:

[findProducts](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/findProducts.html)
, [getProductCompatibilities](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/getProductCompatibilities.html)

Fields
------

order ( _[OrderType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/OrderType.html)
_ ) [\[1\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

Order of the sort, either Ascending or Descending.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/fieldindex.html#order)
 to learn which calls use order.

  

propertyName ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[1\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

Output can be sorted by one or more property names.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/fieldindex.html#propertyName)
 to learn which calls use propertyName.

---

# ret:MoneyMovementDetailType - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ret:MoneyMovementDetailType
===========================

This type is used by the **moneyMovementInfo** container, which consists of detailed information on a monetary transaction.

Type that uses ret:MoneyMovementDetailType:

[ReturnDetailType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnDetailType.html)

Calls that use ret:MoneyMovementDetailType:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)

Fields
------

[actualAmount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ret_MoneyMovementDetailType.html#actualAmount)
 ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ )

[creationDate](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ret_MoneyMovementDetailType.html#creationDate)
 ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ )

[externalPaymentId](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ret_MoneyMovementDetailType.html#externalPaymentId)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[moneyMovementType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ret_MoneyMovementDetailType.html#moneyMovementType)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[paymentProvider](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ret_MoneyMovementDetailType.html#paymentProvider)
 ( _[PaymentProviderEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/PaymentProviderEnum.html)
_ )

[requestedAmount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ret_MoneyMovementDetailType.html#requestedAmount)
 ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ )

[status](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ret_MoneyMovementDetailType.html#status)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

  
  

actualAmount ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows the actual amount of the monetary transaction. The **actualAmount** field will only show up if the monetary transaction was confirmed to be successful (**moneyMovementStatusType** values shows as `SUCCESS`. Until then, the expected amount of the monetary transaction can be seen in the **requestedAmount** field.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#actualAmount)
 to learn which calls use actualAmount.

  

creationDate ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The timestamp in this container indicates the date and time when the monetary transaction occurred.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#creationDate)
 to learn which calls use creationDate.

  

externalPaymentId ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This string value is the unique ID of a monetary transaction that occurred outside of eBay's system.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#externalPaymentId)
 to learn which calls use externalPaymentId.

  

moneyMovementType ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration value indicates the type of monetary transaction that is either in the process of being executed or has already been executed.  
  
The supported enumeration values representing monetary transactions are defined in the [MoneyMovementTypeEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order//devzone/post-order/types/ret_MoneyMovementTypeEnum.html)
 type definition.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#moneyMovementType)
 to learn which calls use moneyMovementType.

  

paymentProvider ( _[PaymentProviderEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/PaymentProviderEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration value indicates the external payment system used for the monetary transaction. If returned, the value of this field should be `UNKNOWN`.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#paymentProvider)
 to learn which calls use paymentProvider.

  

requestedAmount ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows the monetary amount of the transaction.  
  
This field is returned regardless of the value shown in the **moneyMovementStatusType** field. The **actualAmount** field displays only when the monetary transaction was confirmed to be successful (**moneyMovementStatusType** equals `SUCCESS`.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#requestedAmount)
 to learn which calls use requestedAmount.

  

status ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration value indicates the success or failure of the monetary transaction.  
  
The enumeration values that may be returned in this field are defined in the [MoneyMovementStatusEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order//devzone/post-order/types/ret_MoneyMovementStatusEnum.html)
 type definition.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#status)
 to learn which calls use status.

---
