# ReturnEligibilityErrorDetailType - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ReturnEligibilityErrorDetailType
================================

This type is used by the **eligibilityErrorDetail** container, which is returned if an error occurs in regards to an order line item being eligible for a return request.

Type that uses ReturnEligibilityErrorDetailType:

[EligibilityResultType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/EligibilityResultType.html)

Call that uses ReturnEligibilityErrorDetailType:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)

Field
-----

eligibilityError ( _[EligibilityErrorType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/EligibilityErrorType.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container provides information on an error that occurred in regards to an order line item being eligible for a return request.  
  
This container is only returned if one or more errors occur with an item eligibility check.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#eligibilityError)
 to learn which calls use eligibilityError.

---

# ReturnResponseHistoryType - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ReturnResponseHistoryType
=========================

This type is used by the **responseHistory** array, which consists of detailed information of each activity that occurs with a return request.

Type that uses ReturnResponseHistoryType:

[ReturnDetailType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnDetailType.html)

Calls that use ReturnResponseHistoryType:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)

Fields
------

[activity](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnResponseHistoryType.html#activity)
 ( _[ActivityOptionEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ActivityOptionEnum.html)
_ )

[attributes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnResponseHistoryType.html#attributes)
 ( _[ResponseHistoryAttributesType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ResponseHistoryAttributesType.html)
_ )

[author](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnResponseHistoryType.html#author)
 ( _[ReturnUserRoleEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnUserRoleEnum.html)
_ )

[creationDate](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnResponseHistoryType.html#creationDate)
 ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ )

[fromState](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnResponseHistoryType.html#fromState)
 ( _[ReturnStateEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnStateEnum.html)
_ )

[notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnResponseHistoryType.html#notes)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[toState](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnResponseHistoryType.html#toState)
 ( _[ReturnStateEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnStateEnum.html)
_ )

  
  

activity ( _[ActivityOptionEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ActivityOptionEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration value indicates the action performed by the buyer, seller, or eBay to move the return request to the next stage. This field is always returned with each action recorded under the **responseHistory** array.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#activity)
 to learn which calls use activity.

  

attributes ( _[ResponseHistoryAttributesType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ResponseHistoryAttributesType.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container consists of various return shipping and buyer refund information, such as the shipping carrier, shipment tracking number, a partial refund amount (if applicable), and a monetary transaction identifier (if applicable). This container will be returned if the the buyer/seller/eBay action (specified in the **activity** field) requires the data in this container.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#attributes)
 to learn which calls use attributes.

  

author ( _[ReturnUserRoleEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnUserRoleEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration value indicates the actor (such as buyer, seller, or eBay) that performed the action (specified in the **activity** field). This field is always with each action recorded under the **responseHistory** array.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#author)
 to learn which calls use author.

  

creationDate ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The timestamp in this container indicates the date/time when the action (specified in the **activity** field) was performed. This container is always with each action recorded under the **responseHistory** array.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#creationDate)
 to learn which calls use creationDate.

  

fromState ( _[ReturnStateEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnStateEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration value indicates the previous state of the return request before the action (specified in the **activity** field) was performed. This field is always with each action recorded under the **responseHistory** array.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#fromState)
 to learn which calls use fromState.

  

notes ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This string value contains a note about the buyer/seller/eBay action (specified in the **activity** field). This field is only returned if a note exists for the action.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#notes)
 to learn which calls use notes.

  

toState ( _[ReturnStateEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnStateEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration value indicates the new state of the return after the action (specified in the **activity** field) was performed. This field is always with each action recorded under the **responseHistory** array.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#toState)
 to learn which calls use toState.

---

# ProductIdentifier - API Reference - Product API

eBay Product APIVersion 1.6.0

*   [Features Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/guides/ebayfeatures/index.html)
    
*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/Concepts/ProductAPIGuide.html)

*   [Tutorials](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/HowTo/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ProductIdentifier
=================

Type could be ePID, MementoString as well as ISBN, UPC, EAN, Brand\_MPN.

Types that use ProductIdentifier:

[GetProductCompatibilitiesRequest](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/GetProductCompatibilitiesRequest.html)
, [Product](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/Product.html)
, [ProductDetailsRequestType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/ProductDetailsRequestType.html)

Calls that use ProductIdentifier:

[findProducts](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/findProducts.html)
, [getProductCompatibilities](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/getProductCompatibilities.html)
, [getProductDetails](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/getProductDetails.html)

Fields
------

[EAN](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/ProductIdentifier.html#EAN)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[ePID](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/ProductIdentifier.html#ePID)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[ISBN](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/ProductIdentifier.html#ISBN)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[productId](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/ProductIdentifier.html#productId)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[UPC](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/ProductIdentifier.html#UPC)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

  
  

EAN ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..1\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

European Article Number (EAN) value for books. (This is used more commonly in European countries.) If you know a book's EAN, you can use this instead of the eBay CatalogItem or Reference ID to search for that book.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/fieldindex.html#EAN)
 to learn which calls use EAN.

  

ePID ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..1\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

eBay Product ID. eBay's global reference ID for a catalog product. On the eBay Web site, this is known as the "ePID". A reference ID is a fixed reference to a product (regardless of version). One reference ID can be associated with multiple ProductID values. The value should start with "EPID", for example "EPID30971438" (without quotes). You can find reference IDs for products by using GetProducts (or FindProducts in the Shopping API). You can also find the ePID on eBay's Web site.  
  
If the primary and secondary categories are both catalog-enabled, this ID should correspond to the primary category (not the secondary category).

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/fieldindex.html#ePID)
 to learn which calls use ePID.

  

ISBN ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..1\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

ISBN-10 or ISBN-13 value for books. (The string length of ProductID indicates whether the ID is 10 or 13 characters.) If you know a book's ISBN, you can use this instead of the eBay CatalogItem or Reference ID to search for that book.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/fieldindex.html#ISBN)
 to learn which calls use ISBN.

  

productId ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..1\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

eBay's unique identifier for a specific version of a product. This is the long alphanumeric ID that is returned from GetProductSearchResults and related calls. See the Trading API Guide for information about finding this type of product ID. (For the shorter ePID value that is displayed on the eBay Web site, see ProductReferenceID instead.)

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/fieldindex.html#productId)
 to learn which calls use productId.

  

UPC ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..1\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

eBay Product ID.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/fieldindex.html#UPC)
 to learn which calls use UPC.

# ReturnStatusType - API Reference - Return Management API

eBay Return Management APIVersion 1.1.0

*   [Features Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/guides/ebayfeatures/index.html)
    
*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/Concepts/ReturnManagementAPIGuide.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/Concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/Concepts/index.html)
    
*   [Tutorials](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/HowTo/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ReturnStatusType ( [token](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#token)
 )
========================================================================================================================

Enumerated type containing the possible states for a return.

Type that uses ReturnStatusType:

[ReturnSummaryType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/types/ReturnSummaryType.html)

Calls that use one or more values of ReturnStatusType:

[getReturnDetail](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/getReturnDetail.html)
, [getUserReturns](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/getUserReturns.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| CLOSED | This value indicates that the return has been closed. |
| ESCALATED | This value indicates that the buyer has escalated the return to an eBay Buyer Protection case. When a return is escalated to an eBay Buyer Protection case, the return is closed. |
| ITEM\_DELIVERED | This value indicates that the returned item has been received by the seller. |
| ITEM\_SHIPPED | This value indicates that the buyer has shipped the item back to the seller. |
| READY\_FOR\_SHIPPING | This value indicates that the buyer is cleared to ship the item back to the seller. |
| UNKNOWN | This value indicates that the status of the return is unknown. |
| WAITING\_FOR\_SELLER\_INFO | This value indicates that the the buyer is expecting to receive an RMA (Return Merchandise Authorization) number and/or an alternative return shipping address from the seller before the item is shipped back to the seller. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

 )

The response container for the **getConsolidationJobStatus** call.

Field

Job ( _[ConsolidationJob](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/ConsolidationJob.html)

# ReturnAddressRequest - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ReturnAddressRequest
====================

This type is used by the request payload of the **POST /post-order/v2/casemanagement/{caseId}/provide\_return\_address** method, and the payload is used to provide the seller's return address and Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) number (if applicable) to the seller.

Call that uses ReturnAddressRequest:

[/post-order/v2/casemanagement/{caseId}/provide\_return\_address POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseid_provide_return_address__post.html)

Fields
------

firstName ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The first name associated with the seller's return address, or if applicable, a business or store name.  
  
If a first name or business/store name is defined for the return address, this field should be included in the **POST /post-order/v2/casemanagement/{caseId}/provide\_return\_address** request.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#firstName)
 to learn which calls use firstName.

  

lastName ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The last name associated with the seller's return address.  
  
If a last name is defined for the return address, this field should be included in the **POST /post-order/v2/casemanagement/{caseId}/provide\_return\_address** request.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#lastName)
 to learn which calls use lastName.

  

returnAddress ( _[Address](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Address.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The full return address is provided in this container. This container is required to be in the **POST /post-order/v2/casemanagement/{caseId}/provide\_return\_address** request.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#returnAddress)
 to learn which calls use returnAddress.

  

RMA ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) number associated with the item to be returned. An RMA number is a unique identifier that is provided by a manufacturer and authorizes the return of an item. This field is conditionally required if there is an RMA number associated with the item, and if the buyer is requesting an RMA number.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#RMA)
 to learn which calls use RMA.

---

# ConsolidationJobStatus - API Reference - Business Policies Management API

eBay Business Policies Management APIVersion 1.0.0

*   [Features Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/guides/features-guide/default.html#features-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/Concepts/BusinessPoliciesAPIGuide.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/Concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/index.html)
    
*   [Tutorials](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/HowTo/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ConsolidationJobStatus ( [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#string)
 )
================================================================================================================================

Enumerated type defining the possible status values for a shipping policies consolidation job.

Type that uses ConsolidationJobStatus:

[ConsolidationJob](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/ConsolidationJob.html)

Calls that use one or more values of ConsolidationJobStatus:

[consolidateShippingProfiles](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/consolidateShippingProfiles.html)
, [getConsolidationJobStatus](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/getConsolidationJobStatus.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| Complete | This value indicates that the shipping policies consolidation job has successfully completed. |
| Failed | This value indicates that the shipping policies consolidation job has failed. If this value is returned, it is possible that the user can find the reason for job failure by looking at the **errorMessage** container (if any) in the same response. |
| Running | This value indicates that the shipping policies consolidation job is currently in progress. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# Provide Case Shipment Info - eBay Post-Order API Reference

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

Provide Case Shipment Info
==========================

POST /post-order/v2/casemanagement/{caseId}/provide\_shipment\_info
-------------------------------------------------------------------

**Note:** This call has been deprecated and will be decommissioned on March 2, 2026.

This method is used to provide shipment tracking information for an item that is involved in case.  

This method is not supported in the Sandbox environment.

Input
-----

See also [Samples](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseId_provide_shipment_info__post.html#Samples)
.

#### Resource URI (production)

POST https://api.ebay.com/post-order/v2/casemanagement/{caseId}/provide\_shipment\_info

#### URI parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required? | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **caseId** | [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string) | Required | The unique identifier of a case. This URI parameter is required in order to identify the case for which shipment tracking information is being provided. The case ID value is passed in as part of the method URI. |

  
  

#### HTTP request headers

All requests made to eBay REST operations require you to provide the `authorization` HTTP header for authentication.  
See [HTTP request headers](https://developer.ebay.com/ebay-rest/content/rest-request-components.html#HTTP)
 for details.

  
  

#### Authorization

This call uses standard authorization tokens. See [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
 for details.

#### Payload model

The following lists _all fields that could be included_ in the request.

{ /\* _[ProvideShipmentInfoRequest](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ProvideShipmentInfoRequest.html)
_ \*/
"[shippingCarrierName](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseId_provide_shipment_info__post.html#Request.shippingCarrierName)
": [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
,
"[trackingNumber](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseId_provide_shipment_info__post.html#Request.trackingNumber)
": [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
}

#### Request field descriptions

  
  

| Input Container/Field | Type | Occurrence | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **shippingCarrierName** | [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string) | Required | The shipping carrier enumeration value is passed into this field, and represents the shipping carrier being used to return the item.  <br>  <br>A list of shipping carrier enumeration values can be found in the [ShippingCarrierEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ShippingCarrierEnum.html)<br> type definition. |
| **trackingNumber** | [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string) | Required | The shipment tracking number is passed into this field. This value should be passed in without hyphens or spaces. The seller is responsible for the accuracy of this value, as eBay can only validate that the format is consistent with the format that is used by the specified shipping carrier. |

  

Output
------

See also [Samples](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseId_provide_shipment_info__post.html#Samples)
.

#### Payload model

This call has no response payload.

null

  
  

Samples
-------

New to making API calls? Please see [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
.

Note: Some item IDs, user IDs, or other data in these samples might no longer be active on eBay. If necessary, you can substitute current eBay data in your requests.

Sample: Basic Call

Buyer provides return shipment information to the seller.

**Description**

Now that the return request has been escalated to a case, the seller has finally agreed to issue a full refund upon receiving the returned item from the buyer. With this call, the buyer is providing the shipment tracking information to the seller.

**Input**

The buyer passes in the case ID value as a path parameter to identify the case for which shipment tracking details are being provided to the seller. The **shippingCarriername** field is used to provide the name of the shipping carrier and the **trackingNumber** field is used to provide the tracking number for the shipment.

**URL format**. See also the [non-wrapped](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/Samples/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseid_provide_shipment_info__post_basic_in_url_json.txt)
 version of this URL.

POST https://api.ebay.com/post-order/v2/casemanagement/5\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*3/provide\_shipment\_info
{ 
"shippingCarrierName": "FedEx",
"trackingNumber": "1\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*7"
}

**Output**

There is no output payload with this response. A successful call contains an HTTP status code of 200.

**JSON format**.

  
  

Change History
--------------

| Change Date | Description |
| --- | --- |

---

*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

BaseServiceRequest
==================

This is the base class for request container for all service operations.

Calls that use BaseServiceRequest:

[findProducts](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product/CallRef/findProducts.html)
, [getProductCompatibilities](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product/CallRef/getProductCompatibilities.html)
, [getProductDetails](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product/CallRef/getProductDetails.html)

Fields
------

This type has no fields.

# ReturnTypeEnum - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ReturnTypeEnum
==============

This enumerated type lists the possible values that the buyer can pass in the **type** field when the buyer is creating a return request or draft with the **POST /post-order/v2/return** or **POST /post-order/v2/return/draft** methods.

**Note:** Currently, `MONEY_BACK` is the only supported value.

Types that use ReturnTypeEnum:

[ReturnCreationInfoType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ReturnCreationInfoType.html)
, [ReturnRequestType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ReturnRequestType.html)
, [ReturnSummaryType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ReturnSummaryType.html)

Calls that use one or more values of ReturnTypeEnum:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/search GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return_search__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| EXCHANGE | **Note:** This value is deprecated. |
| MONEY\_BACK | This enumeration value indicates that the buyer is seeking a full refund after returning the item. |
| REPLACEMENT | This enumeration value indicates that the buyer is seeking a replacement item after returning the item.<br><br>**Note:** This value is not currently supported. |
| UNKNOWN | **Note:** This value is deprecated. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# PaymentProfile - API Reference - Business Policies Management API

eBay Business Policies Management APIVersion 1.0.0

*   [Features Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/guides/features-guide/default.html#features-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/Concepts/BusinessPoliciesAPIGuide.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/Concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/index.html)
    
*   [Tutorials](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/HowTo/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

PaymentProfile ( [SellerProfile](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/SellerProfile.html)
 )
==========================================================================================================================

Type defining the **paymentProfile** container, which is the container used to define one payment policy for a seller.

Types that use PaymentProfile:

[AddSellerProfileRequest](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/AddSellerProfileRequest.html)
, [AddSellerProfileResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/AddSellerProfileResponse.html)
, [PaymentProfileList](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/PaymentProfileList.html)
, [SetSellerProfileRequest](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/SetSellerProfileRequest.html)
, [SetSellerProfileResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/SetSellerProfileResponse.html)

Calls that use PaymentProfile:

[addSellerProfile](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/addSellerProfile.html)
, [getSellerProfiles](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/getSellerProfiles.html)
, [setSellerProfile](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/setSellerProfile.html)

Field
-----

paymentInfo ( _[PaymentInfo](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/PaymentInfo.html)
_ ) [\[0..1\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container consists of detailed payment information for a seller's payment policy. This container is conditionally required if the caller is creating a new payment policy or modifying an existing payment policy.  
  
This container is returned by **getSellerProfiles** if one or more payment policies match the input criteria in the call request, and is returned in the response of **addSellerProfile** or **setSellerProfile** if a payment policy is being created or modified, respectively.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/fieldindex.html#paymentInfo)
 to learn which calls use paymentInfo.

---

# PartialOrderTypeEnum - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

PartialOrderTypeEnum
====================

This enumeration type defines the values that can be used to describe the scope of an order cancellation.  
  
**Note:** At this time, only full order cancellations are supported. Neither a buyer or a seller may initiate the cancellation of just one line item within a multiple line item order.

Types that use PartialOrderTypeEnum:

[CancelDetail](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CancelDetail.html)
, [CancelSummary](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CancelSummary.html)

Calls that use one or more values of PartialOrderTypeEnum:

[/post-order/v2/cancellation/search GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_cancellation_search__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/cancellation/{cancelId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_cancellation-cancelid__get.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| FULL\_ORDER | This enumeration value indicates that the order cancellation request involves the entire order. |
| PARTIAL\_ORDER | This enumeration value is not currently applicable, and is reserved for future use. |
| UNKNOWN | This enumeration value may get returned if eBay cannot determine the scope of the order cancellation. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/fieldindex.html#propertyName)
 to learn which calls use propertyName.

_ ) [\[0..\*\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

# PayoutRecoupInfo - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

PayoutRecoupInfo
================

This type defines the amount of the seller payout, which must be recouped from the seller by eBay in the case of a cancelled order.

Types that use PayoutRecoupInfo:

[CancelDetail](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CancelDetail.html)
, [CancelSummary](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CancelSummary.html)

Calls that use PayoutRecoupInfo:

[/post-order/v2/cancellation/search GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_cancellation_search__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/cancellation/{cancelId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_cancellation-cancelid__get.html)

Fields
------

amountToRecoup ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows the amount of the seller payout which must be recouped from the seller by eBay in the case of a cancelled order

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#amountToRecoup)
 to learn which calls use amountToRecoup.

  

payoutId ( _[integer](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#integer)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The unique identifier of the seller payout associated with the cancelled order.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#payoutId)
 to learn which calls use payoutId.

---

# PaymentStatusEnum - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

PaymentStatusEnum
=================

This enumerated type defines the status values for a buyer's payment for an order.

Types that use PaymentStatusEnum:

[CancelDetail](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CancelDetail.html)
, [CancelSummary](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CancelSummary.html)

Calls that use one or more values of PaymentStatusEnum:

[/post-order/v2/cancellation/search GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_cancellation_search__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/cancellation/{cancelId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_cancellation-cancelid__get.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| MARK\_AS\_PAID | This enumeration value indicates that the seller marked the payment status of the order as paid. |
| NOT\_PAID | This enumeration value indicates that the payment status of the order is unpaid. |
| ONLINE\_PAID | This enumeration value indicates that the payment status of the order is paid. |
| PAYPAL\_PAID | **THIS ENUMERATION VALUE IS DEPRECATED.** |
| UNKNOWN | This enumeration value indicates that the payment status of the order cannot be determined. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# RequestTypeEnum - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

RequestTypeEnum
===============

This enumerated type allows a user to differentiate between a return request and a return request draft.

Type that uses RequestTypeEnum:

[ReturnRequestType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ReturnRequestType.html)

Call that uses one or more values of RequestTypeEnum:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| CREATE | Indicates the request is for a return request draft. |
| REQUEST | Indicates the request is for a return request. |
| UNKNOWN | Indicates that it's undetermined if the request is for a return request or a return request draft. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# ItemDetails - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ItemDetails
===========

This type provides information about the line item associated with the INR inquiry.

Type that uses ItemDetails:

[InquiryDetailsResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetailsResponse.html)

Call that uses ItemDetails:

[/post-order/v2/inquiry/{inquiryId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_inquiry-inquiryid__get.html)

Fields
------

[itemOnHold](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ItemDetails.html#itemOnHold)
 ( _[boolean](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#boolean)
_ )

[itemPictureUrl](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ItemDetails.html#itemPictureUrl)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[itemPrice](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ItemDetails.html#itemPrice)
 ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ )

[itemTitle](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ItemDetails.html#itemTitle)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[viewPurchasedItemUrl](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ItemDetails.html#viewPurchasedItemUrl)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

  
  

itemOnHold ( _[boolean](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#boolean)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This field indicates the item related to the inquiry is hidden (the respective content is not returned). This field is returned as 'true' if the item is on hold due to eBay policy violation; false otherwise.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#itemOnHold)
 to learn which calls use itemOnHold.

  

itemPictureUrl ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This field provides an URL where the gallery picture of the item may be viewed. This field is returned when available. If the item is on hold, this field may not be returned.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#itemPictureUrl)
 to learn which calls use itemPictureUrl.

  

itemPrice ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows the final price of the line item, or the amount of money that the buyer agreed to pay for the item.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#itemPrice)
 to learn which calls use itemPrice.

  

itemTitle ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The title of the eBay listing. If the item is on hold, the **itemID** of the listing is returned instead of the title.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#itemTitle)
 to learn which calls use itemTitle.

  

viewPurchasedItemUrl ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

When available, this field provides the URL to the item purchase page. If the item is on hold, a placeholder may be returned instead of the gallery picture.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#viewPurchasedItemUrl)
 to learn which calls use viewPurchasedItemUrl.

---

# ReturnRefundInitiatorEnum - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ReturnRefundInitiatorEnum
=========================

This enumerated type lists the values that indicate the initiator of the refund.

Type that uses ReturnRefundInitiatorEnum:

[ActualRefundDetailType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ActualRefundDetailType.html)

Calls that use one or more values of ReturnRefundInitiatorEnum:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| AUTO\_REFUND | This enumeration value indicates that eBay automatically refunded the buyer. |
| OTHER | This enumeration value indicates that the initiator of the refund is unknown. |
| SELLER\_INITIATED | This enumeration value indicates that the refund was initiated by the seller. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# FundingSourceType - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

FundingSourceType
=================

This type provides details on the seller's funding source used for buyer refund.

Type that uses FundingSourceType:

[RefundFundingType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/RefundFundingType.html)

Calls that use FundingSourceType:

[/post-order/v2/cancellation/{cancelId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_cancellation-cancelid__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)

Fields
------

brand ( _[FundingMethodBrandEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/FundingMethodBrandEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The enumeration value here indicates the brand of credit card used to fund the buyer's refund. This field is only returned if the funding source type is `CREDIT_CARD`.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#brand)
 to learn which calls use brand.

  

memo ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This provides a note about the funding source. This field is only returned if available, or it might get returned as an empty string.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#memo)
 to learn which calls use memo.

  

type ( _[FundingMethodTypeEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/FundingMethodTypeEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The enumeration value here indicates the type of funding source, such as bank account, credit card, or available seller payout funds.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#type)
 to learn which calls use type.

# ReturnTypeEnum - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ReturnTypeEnum
==============

This enumerated type lists the possible values that the buyer can pass in the **type** field when the buyer is creating a return request or draft with the **POST /post-order/v2/return** or **POST /post-order/v2/return/draft** methods.

**Note:** Currently, `MONEY_BACK` is the only supported value.

Types that use ReturnTypeEnum:

[ReturnCreationInfoType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnCreationInfoType.html)
, [ReturnRequestType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnRequestType.html)
, [ReturnSummaryType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnSummaryType.html)

Calls that use one or more values of ReturnTypeEnum:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/search GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return_search__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| EXCHANGE | **Note:** This value is deprecated. |
| MONEY\_BACK | This enumeration value indicates that the buyer is seeking a full refund after returning the item. |
| REPLACEMENT | This enumeration value indicates that the buyer is seeking a replacement item after returning the item.<br><br>**Note:** This value is not currently supported. |
| UNKNOWN | **Note:** This value is deprecated. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

 )

[addSellerProfile](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/addSellerProfile.html)
, [consolidateShippingProfiles](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/consolidateShippingProfiles.html)
, [getConsolidationJobStatus](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/getConsolidationJobStatus.html)
, [getSellerProfiles](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/getSellerProfiles.html)
, [getVersion](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/getVersion.html)
, [removeOverrides](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/removeOverrides.html)
, [removeProfile](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/removeProfile.html)
, [removeSellerProfiles](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/removeSellerProfiles.html)
, [setSellerProfile](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/setSellerProfile.html)

Fields
------

This type has no fields.

Attribute
---------

name ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

The name of the input parameter returned with the error. Inspecting the parameter (or its input value) will often aid in understanding the cause of the error. Not all error messages contain this value.

---

# FundingStatusEnum - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

FundingStatusEnum
=================

This enumerated type is used to indicate if eBay was able to successfully 'fund' a refund to the buyer using the seller's preferred method of payment for refunds.

Types that use FundingStatusEnum:

[MoneyMovementEntry](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/MoneyMovementEntry.html)
, [RefundFundingType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/RefundFundingType.html)

Calls that use one or more values of FundingStatusEnum:

[/post-order/v2/cancellation/{cancelId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_cancellation-cancelid__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/casemanagement/{caseId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseid__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/inquiry/{inquiryId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_inquiry-inquiryid__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| FAILED | This enumeration value indicates that the refund was not successfully funded, which can mean there were insufficient funds in the account, or that the transaction failed for another reason. |
| FUNDED | This enumeration value indicates that the buyer refund was successfully funded. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# ReturnCloseInfoType - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ReturnCloseInfoType
===================

This type is used by the **closeInfo** container, which provides information on a closed return request.

Type that uses ReturnCloseInfoType:

[ReturnDetailType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnDetailType.html)

Calls that use ReturnCloseInfoType:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)

Fields
------

buyerCloseComment ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This string field will be returned if the buyer made a comment when closing the return request. This field is only returned if the return request was closed and the buyer made a comment upon closing the return request.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#buyerCloseComment)
 to learn which calls use buyerCloseComment.

  

buyerCloseReason ( _[BuyerCloseReturnReasonEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/BuyerCloseReturnReasonEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration value indicates the reason that the buyer is closing the return request. A buyer would typically close a return request after they receive a refund or if they initiated the return request by mistake. This field is only returned if the return request was closed and the buyer was the one (and not eBay) that initiated the closure of the return request.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#buyerCloseReason)
 to learn which calls use buyerCloseReason.

  

returnCloseDate ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The timestamp in this container indicates when the return request was closed. This field is only returned if the return request was closed.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#returnCloseDate)
 to learn which calls use returnCloseDate.

  

returnCloseReason ( _[CloseReturnReasonEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CloseReturnReasonEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration value indicates the reason why the return request was closed. The enumeration value returned here will be the reason why eBay closed the return request, and not why the buyer wanted to close the return request. This field is only returned if the return request was closed.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#returnCloseReason)
 to learn which calls use returnCloseReason.

---

# CaseSummaryType - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

CaseSummaryType
===============

This type is used to provide a summary of information on each case that is returned in the **GET /post-order/v2/casemanagement/search** response.

Type that uses CaseSummaryType:

[CaseSearchResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CaseSearchResponse.html)

Call that uses CaseSummaryType:

[/post-order/v2/casemanagement/search GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement_search__get.html)

Fields
------

[buyer](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CaseSummaryType.html#buyer)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[caseId](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CaseSummaryType.html#caseId)
 ( _[integer](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#integer)
_ )

[caseStatusEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CaseSummaryType.html#caseStatusEnum)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[claimAmount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CaseSummaryType.html#claimAmount)
 ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ )

[creationDate](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CaseSummaryType.html#creationDate)
 ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ )

[itemId](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CaseSummaryType.html#itemId)
 ( _[integer](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#integer)
_ )

[lastModifiedDate](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CaseSummaryType.html#lastModifiedDate)
 ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ )

[respondByDate](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CaseSummaryType.html#respondByDate)
 ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ )

[seller](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CaseSummaryType.html#seller)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[transactionId](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CaseSummaryType.html#transactionId)
 ( _[integer](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#integer)
_ )

  
  

buyer ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The eBay user ID of the buyer involved in the case.  
  
**Note:** Effective September 26, 2025, select developers will no longer receive username data for U.S. users through this field. Instead, an immutable user ID will be returned in its place. For more information, please refer to [Data Handling Compliance](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order//api-docs/static/data-handling-update.html)
.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#buyer)
 to learn which calls use buyer.

  

caseId ( _[integer](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#integer)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The unique identifier of the case.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#caseId)
 to learn which calls use caseId.

  

caseStatusEnum ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration value indicates the current status of the case.  
  
The list of enumeration values that may be returned in this field are defined in the [CaseStatusEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order//devzone/post-order/types/CaseStatusEnum.html)
 type definition.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#caseStatusEnum)
 to learn which calls use caseStatusEnum.

  

claimAmount ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container displays the dollar value of the order line item associated with the case, which is generally the amount of the refund that the buyer will receive if the buyer is looking for a refund, or if the seller voluntarily refunds the buyer.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#claimAmount)
 to learn which calls use claimAmount.

  

creationDate ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The timestamp in this container indicates when the case was created.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#creationDate)
 to learn which calls use creationDate.

  

itemId ( _[integer](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#integer)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The unique identifier of the eBay listing where the line item was purchased. This field is used in conjunction with the **transactionId** field to identify a line item that is associated with the case.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#itemId)
 to learn which calls use itemId.

  

lastModifiedDate ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The timestamp in this container indicates when the last action was performed on the case.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#lastModifiedDate)
 to learn which calls use lastModifiedDate.

  

respondByDate ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The timestamp in this container indicates the deadline for when a buyer or seller must perform the next action on the case. This field will only be returned if there is a deadline associated with the next action.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#respondByDate)
 to learn which calls use respondByDate.

  

seller ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The eBay user ID of the seller involved in the case.  
  
**Note:** Effective September 26, 2025, select developers will no longer receive username data for U.S. users through this field. Instead, an immutable user ID will be returned in its place. For more information, please refer to [Data Handling Compliance](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order//api-docs/static/data-handling-update.html)
.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#seller)
 to learn which calls use seller.

  

transactionId ( _[integer](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#integer)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The unique identifier of the purchase transaction. This value is created right when the buyer is committed to buying the item, whether that buyer uses a 'Buy it Now' capability, is the winning bidder of an auction, or the buyer's Best Offer is accepted by the seller. This field is used in conjunction with the **itemId** field to identify the line item that is associated with the case.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#transactionId)
 to learn which calls use transactionId.

---

# EstimatedRefundType - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

EstimatedRefundType
===================

This type is used by the **estimatedRefundDetail.itemizedRefundDetail** container, which shows the estimated refund information before the seller issues a refund to the buyer. Once the refund is actually successfully processed, information on the refund may be seen in the **actualRefundDetail** container.

Type that uses EstimatedRefundType:

[EstimatedRefundDetailType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/EstimatedRefundDetailType.html)

Calls that use EstimatedRefundType:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)

Fields
------

[estimatedAmount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/EstimatedRefundType.html#estimatedAmount)
 ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ )

[maxAmount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/EstimatedRefundType.html#maxAmount)
 ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ )

[minAmount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/EstimatedRefundType.html#minAmount)
 ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ )

[purchasePriceDeductedPercentageList](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/EstimatedRefundType.html#purchasePriceDeductedPercentageList)
 ( array of _[integer](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#integer)
_ )

[refundFeeType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/EstimatedRefundType.html#refundFeeType)
 ( _[RefundFeeTypeEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/RefundFeeTypeEnum.html)
_ )

[restockingFeePercentage](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/EstimatedRefundType.html#restockingFeePercentage)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

  
  

estimatedAmount ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows the estimated amount of the refund.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#estimatedAmount)
 to learn which calls use estimatedAmount.

  

maxAmount ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows the maximum amount that the refund could be based on the cost of the order.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#maxAmount)
 to learn which calls use maxAmount.

  

minAmount ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows the minimum amount that the refund could be based on the cost of the order.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#minAmount)
 to learn which calls use minAmount.

  

purchasePriceDeductedPercentageList ( array of _[integer](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#integer)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This array shows one or more percentage values, and these values indicate the percentage value(s) deducted off of the purchase price.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#purchasePriceDeductedPercentageList)
 to learn which calls use purchasePriceDeductedPercentageList.

  

refundFeeType ( _[RefundFeeTypeEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/RefundFeeTypeEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumerated value indicates the type of refund. When issuing a refund through the **POST /post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/issue\_refund** method, the seller must use a separate **itemizedRefundDetail** container for each refund type, such as one for the purchase price, one for original shipping, and one for a restocking fee (if applicable).

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#refundFeeType)
 to learn which calls use refundFeeType.

  

restockingFeePercentage ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

**THIS FIELD IS DEPRECATED.**

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#restockingFeePercentage)
 to learn which calls use restockingFeePercentage.

---

# ReturnSummaryType - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ReturnSummaryType
=================

This type is used by the **summary** container in the **GET /post-order/v2/return/search**, **POST /post-order/v2/return/**, and **GET /post-order/v2/return/{returnId}** methods. This container provides a summary of information for the return request. This container is not returned in the 'Get' methods if the **fieldgroups** query parameter is omitted, or if it is used and its value is set to `FULL`.

Types that use ReturnSummaryType:

[CreateReturnResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CreateReturnResponse.html)
, [GetDetailResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/GetDetailResponse.html)
, [GetSummaryResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/GetSummaryResponse.html)

Calls that use ReturnSummaryType:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/search GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return_search__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)

[currentType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnSummaryType.html#currentType)
