TrackingStatusType ( [token](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#token)
 )

Enumerated type that contains the possible values that can be returned in the **deliveryStatus** field of the **provideTrackingInfo** response. This value will indicate the status of the package shipment.

------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| DELIEVERED | This value indicates that the package has been delivered. |
| IN\_TRANSIT | This value indicates that the package is in transit. |
| UNKNOWN | This value indicates that the shipping status of the package is unknown. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

# ActivityOptionType - API Reference - Return Management API

eBay Return Management APIVersion 1.1.0

*   [Features Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/guides/ebayfeatures/index.html)
    
*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/Concepts/ReturnManagementAPIGuide.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/Concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/Concepts/index.html)
    
*   [Tutorials](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/HowTo/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ActivityOptionType ( [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#string)
 )
============================================================================================================================

Enumerated type that defines a seller's next possible actions to take in a return.

Type that uses ActivityOptionType:

[GetActivityOptionsResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/types/GetActivityOptionsResponse.html)

Call that uses one or more values of ActivityOptionType:

[getActivityOptions](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/getActivityOptions.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| ISSUE\_REFUND | This value indicates that the seller's next action is to issue a refund to the buyer through the **issueRefund** call. |
| OTHER | This value is reserved for future use. |
| PROVIDE\_SELLER\_INFO | This value indicates that the seller's next action is to provide an RMA (Return Merchandise Authorization) number to the buyer through the **provideSellerInfo** call. |
| SELLER\_MARK\_AS\_RECEIVED | This value indicates that the seller's next action is to mark the returned item as received through the **setItemAsReceived** call. |
| SELLER\_PRINT\_SHIPPING\_LABEL | This value indicates that the seller's next action is to print a shipping label for the replacement item |
| SELLER\_PROVIDE\_TRACKING\_INFO | This value indicates that the seller's next action is to upload a tracking number for the replacement item through the **provideTrackingInfo** call. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# MoneyMovementEntries - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

MoneyMovementEntries
====================

This type is used to provide details on any monetary transactions that occur in association with an INR inquiry or a case.

Type that uses MoneyMovementEntries:

[ClaimHistoryEventModel](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ClaimHistoryEventModel.html)

Calls that use MoneyMovementEntries:

[/post-order/v2/casemanagement/{caseId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseid__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/inquiry/{inquiryId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_inquiry-inquiryid__get.html)

Field
-----

moneyMovementEntryList ( array of _[MoneyMovementEntry](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/MoneyMovementEntry.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This array contains details about one or more monetary transactions associated with an INR inquiry or a case. This array is only returned if monetary transactions have occurred with the INR inquiry or case.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#moneyMovementEntryList)
 to learn which calls use moneyMovementEntryList.

---

# AppealGrantStatusEnum - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

AppealGrantStatusEnum
=====================

This enumeration type contains the possible outcomes of a case decision that has been appealed by the buyer or seller.

Type that uses AppealGrantStatusEnum:

[AppealDetails](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/AppealDetails.html)

Calls that use one or more values of AppealGrantStatusEnum:

[/post-order/v2/casemanagement/{caseId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseid__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/inquiry/{inquiryId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_inquiry-inquiryid__get.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| DENIED | This enumeration value indicates that the buyer's or seller's appeal was denied. |
| GRANTED | This enumeration value indicates that the buyer's or seller's appeal was granted. |
| OTHER | This enumeration value indicates that the outcome of the buyer's or seller's appeal is unknown. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# DecideReturnRequest - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

DecideReturnRequest
===================

The base request type of the **POST /post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/decide** method.

Call that uses DecideReturnRequest:

[/post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/decide POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid_decide__post.html)

Fields
------

[comments](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DecideReturnRequest.html#comments)
 ( _[Text](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Text.html)
_ )

[decision](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DecideReturnRequest.html#decision)
 ( _[DecisionEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DecisionEnum.html)
_ )

[keepOriginalItem](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DecideReturnRequest.html#keepOriginalItem)
 ( _[boolean](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#boolean)
_ )

[partialRefundAmount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DecideReturnRequest.html#partialRefundAmount)
 ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ )

[RMANumber](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DecideReturnRequest.html#RMANumber)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[rMAProvided](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DecideReturnRequest.html#rMAProvided)
 ( _[boolean](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#boolean)
_ )

  
  

comments ( _[Text](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Text.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container is used by the seller or buyer to provide more information about the action that is being performed with the **decide** method.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#comments)
 to learn which calls use comments.

  

decision ( _[DecisionEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DecisionEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This field must be included in each request, and the value that is supplied here will depend on whether the seller or the buyer is using this method, and it will also depend on the current state of the return request. The **POST /post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/decide** request will fail unless an appropriate value is specified in this field.  
  
Sellers can use this method to approve or decline a return request, offer a partial refund to the buyer, or provide a Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) number to the buyer.  
  
Buyers can use this method to accept or decline a partial refund offer.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#decision)
 to learn which calls use decision.

  

keepOriginalItem ( _[boolean](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#boolean)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The seller can include this field and set it to `true` if they are OK with the buyer keeping the original item they received, and not requiring them to return the item. A seller may choose to do this in the case of a SNAD item or if the buyer is claiming that the item arrived damaged or was missing parts.  
  
**Default:** `false`

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#keepOriginalItem)
 to learn which calls use keepOriginalItem.

  

partialRefundAmount ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container is conditionally required if the seller is using the **decide** method to offer a partial refund amount to the buyer in order to settle the return request. This amount is the amount the seller is willing to offer the buyer as a partial refund. This field has no relevance if anything other than `OFFER_PARTIAL_REFUND` is passed in the **decision** field.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#partialRefundAmount)
 to learn which calls use partialRefundAmount.

  

RMANumber ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This field is conditionally required if the seller is using the **POST /post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/decide** method to provide a return merchandise authorization (RMA) to the buyer. The RMA value cannot be validated by eBay, so the seller should pay close attention to ensure that the RMA is accurate. If an RMA is provided in this field, the **decision** value should be `PROVIDE_RMA`.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#RMANumber)
 to learn which calls use RMANumber.

  

rMAProvided ( _[boolean](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#boolean)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

If set to `true`, it indicates that the seller provided an RMA number to the buyer for processing of the return.  
  
**Default:** `false`

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#rMAProvided)
 to learn which calls use rMAProvided.

---

# Issue Case Refund - eBay Post-Order API Reference

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

Issue Case Refund
=================

POST /post-order/v2/casemanagement/{caseId}/issue\_refund
---------------------------------------------------------

**Note:** This call has been deprecated and will be decommissioned on March 2, 2026.

This method can be used on behalf of sellers to issue a full refund to the buyer to resolve an INR or Return case that was filed against the seller. The seller can voluntarily use this method before eBay customer support makes a decision on the case, or after, when and if eBay customer supports rules in favor of the buyer and forces the seller to issue a refund to the buyer.**Important!** Due to EU & UK Payments regulatory requirements, an additional security verification via Digital Signatures is required for certain API calls that are made on behalf of EU/UK sellers, including this method. Please refer to [Digital Signatures for APIs](https://developer.ebay.com/develop/guides/digital-signatures-for-apis)
 to learn more on the impacted APIs and the process to create signature to be included in the HTTP payload.

This method is not supported in the Sandbox environment.

Input
-----

See also [Samples](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseId_issue_refund__post.html#Samples)
.

#### Resource URI (production)

POST https://api.ebay.com/post-order/v2/casemanagement/{caseId}/issue\_refund

#### URI parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required? | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **caseId** | [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string) | Required | The unique identifier of a case. This URI parameter is required in order to identify the case for which a full refund will be issued to the buyer. The case ID value is passed in as part of the call URI. |

  
  

#### HTTP request headers

All requests made to eBay REST operations require you to provide the `authorization` HTTP header for authentication.  
See [HTTP request headers](https://developer.ebay.com/ebay-rest/content/rest-request-components.html#HTTP)
 for details.

  
  

#### Authorization

This call uses standard authorization tokens. See [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
 for details.

#### Payload model

The following lists _all fields that could be included_ in the request.

{ /\* _[CaseVoluntaryRefundRequest](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/CaseVoluntaryRefundRequest.html)
_ \*/
"[comments](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseId_issue_refund__post.html#Request.comments)
":
    { /\* [Text](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/Text.html)
 \*/
    "[content](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseId_issue_refund__post.html#Request.comments.content)
": [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
,
    "[language](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseId_issue_refund__post.html#Request.comments.language)
": [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
,
    "[translatedFromContent](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseId_issue_refund__post.html#Request.comments.translatedFromContent)
": [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
,
    "[translatedFromLanguage](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseId_issue_refund__post.html#Request.comments.translatedFromLanguage)
": [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
    }
}

#### Request field descriptions

  
  

| Input Container/Field | Type | Occurrence | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **comments** | [Text](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/Text.html) | Optional | This container is used if the seller wants to add a note or explanation about the refund being issued. |
| comments.**content** | [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string) | Conditional | This field displays the actual textual content in the language specified in the **language** field. This field is always used for containers using the **Text** type. |
| comments.**language** | [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string) | Conditional | This two-letter code indicates the language used to display the content in the **content** field. The language will default to the language used on the eBay site if a specific language is not specified through the **Accept-Language** HTTP header. This field is always used for containers using the **Text** type.  <br>  <br>The full list of language enumeration values are defined in the [LanguageEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/LanguageEnum.html)<br> type definition.  <br>  <br>**Applicable values**: See [LanguageEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/LanguageEnum.html) |
| comments.**translatedFromContent** | [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string) | Conditional | If language translation/localization is required, this field displays the actual textual content in the language specified in the **translatedFromLanguage** field. If language translation was not required, this field is not applicable. |
| comments  <br>  .**translatedFromLanguage** | [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string) | Conditional | If language translation/localization is required, this two-letter code indicates the language used to display the content in the **translatedFromContent** field. If language translation was not required, this field is not applicable.  <br>  <br>The full list of language enumeration values are defined in the [LanguageEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/LanguageEnum.html)<br> type definition.  <br>  <br>**Applicable values**: See [LanguageEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/LanguageEnum.html) |

  

Output
------

See also [Samples](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseId_issue_refund__post.html#Samples)
.

#### Payload model

**Note:** For information about the error fields and how to work with them, see [Error Handling](https://developer.ebay.com/ebay-rest/content/handling-error-messages.html)
.

The following lists _all fields that could be included_ in the response.

{ /\* _[VoluntaryRefundResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/VoluntaryRefundResponse.html)
_ \*/
"[refundResult](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseId_issue_refund__post.html#Response.refundResult)
":
    { /\* [VoluntaryRefundResult](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/VoluntaryRefundResult.html)
 \*/
    "[refundSource](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseId_issue_refund__post.html#Response.refundResult.refundSource)
": [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
,
    "[refundStatus](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseId_issue_refund__post.html#Response.refundResult.refundStatus)
": [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
    }
}

#### Response field descriptions

  
  

| Output Container/Field | Type | Occurrence | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **refundResult** | [VoluntaryRefundResult](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/VoluntaryRefundResult.html) | Always | This container shows the result of the refund action and the source being used for the buyer refund. |
| refundResult.**refundSource** | [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string) | Always | This enumeration value indicates the payment source used to refund the buyer to resolve an inquiry or case.  <br>  <br>**Applicable values are from [RefundPaymentTypeEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/RefundPaymentTypeEnum.html)<br>**:  <br>  <br><br>ECHECK<br><br>This enumeration value indicates that a refund to the buyer was supplemented by available seller payout funds, and one or more other funding sources such as the seller's bank account.<br><br>INSTANT\_REFUND<br><br>This enumeration value indicates that an instant refund was issued to the buyer.<br><br>INTERMEDIATED\_REFUND<br><br>This enumeration value indicates that a refund is being intermediated by eBay.<br><br>OTHER<br><br>This enumeration value indicates that the refund payment source cannot be determined.<br><br>PAYOUT<br><br>This enumeration value indicates that the buyer refund was taken from available funds from the seller payout.<br><br>  <br>Code so that your app gracefully handles any future changes to this list. |
| refundResult.**refundStatus** | [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string) | Always | This enumeration value indicates the success or failure of a full refund being issued by the seller through an **issue\_refund** method.  <br>  <br>**Applicable values are from [RefundStatusEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/RefundStatusEnum.html)<br>**:  <br>  <br><br>FAILED<br><br>This enumeration value indicates that the refund to the buyer failed.<br><br>OTHER<br><br>This enumeration value indicates that the refund status cannot be determined by eBay.<br><br>PENDING<br><br>This enumeration value indicates that the buyer refund is in the pending state.<br><br>SUCCESS<br><br>This enumeration value indicates that the refund to the buyer was successful.<br><br>  <br>Code so that your app gracefully handles any future changes to this list. |

null

  
  

Samples
-------

New to making API calls? Please see [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
.

Note: Some item IDs, user IDs, or other data in these samples might no longer be active on eBay. If necessary, you can substitute current eBay data in your requests.

Sample: Issue a Refund

This operation issues a refund to the buyer.

**Description**

You can use this operation on behalf of the seller to issue a refund for an order line item after the buyer has filed an INR or Return case against the seller.

**Input**

The **caseId** path parameter identifies the INR or Return case asociated with the order line item being refunded. This call includes an optional comment from the seller to the buyer.

**URL format**. See also the [non-wrapped](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/Samples/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseid_issue_refund__post_basic_in_url_json.txt)
 version of this URL.

POST https://api.ebay.com/post-order/v2/casemanagement/5\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*7/issue\_refund
{
  "comments": {
    "content": "Your refund is on its way."
  }
}

**Output**

The reponse payload indicates that an instant refund was successfully issued to the buyer from the seller's PayPal account.

**JSON format**.
{
  "refundResult": {
    "refundSource": "INSTANT\_REFUND",
    "refundStatus": "SUCCESS"
  }
}

# ErrorSeverity - API Reference - Business Policies Management API

eBay Business Policies Management APIVersion 1.0.0

*   [Features Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/guides/features-guide/default.html#features-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/Concepts/BusinessPoliciesAPIGuide.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/Concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/index.html)
    
*   [Tutorials](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/HowTo/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ErrorSeverity ( [token](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#token)
 )
=====================================================================================================================

Indicates whether the error is a fatal error (causing the request to fail) or a less severe error (a warning) that should be communicated to the user.

Type that uses ErrorSeverity:

[ErrorData](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/ErrorData.html)

Calls that use one or more values of ErrorSeverity:

[addSellerProfile](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/addSellerProfile.html)
, [consolidateShippingProfiles](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/consolidateShippingProfiles.html)
, [getConsolidationJobStatus](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/getConsolidationJobStatus.html)
, [getSellerProfiles](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/getSellerProfiles.html)
, [getVersion](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/getVersion.html)
, [removeOverrides](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/removeOverrides.html)
, [removeProfile](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/removeProfile.html)
, [removeSellerProfiles](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/removeSellerProfiles.html)
, [setSellerProfile](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/setSellerProfile.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| Error | eBay encountered a fatal error during the processing of the request, causing the request to fail. When eBay encounters an error, it returns error data instead of the requested business data. Inspect the error details and resolve the problem before resubmitting the request. |
| Warning | The request was successfully processed, but eBay encountered a non-fatal error during the processing that could affect the data returned. For example, eBay might have changed the value of an input field. In this response, eBay returns a successful response, but it also returns a warning. For best results, requests should return without warnings. Inspect the warning details and resolve the problem before resubmitting the request. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# ItemizedRefundDetailType - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ItemizedRefundDetailType
========================

This type is used by the **itemizedRefundDetail** container to provide details about a refund that was issued, or is in the process of being issued to the buyer. An **itemizedRefundDetail** container is required for each different refund type, such as purchase price and original shipping.

Type that uses ItemizedRefundDetailType:

[RefundDetailType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/RefundDetailType.html)

Calls that use ItemizedRefundDetailType:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/issue\_refund POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid_issue_refund__post.html)

Fields
------

refundAmount ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows the amount of the refund for the particular refund type (specified in the **refundFeeType** field). When issuing a refund through the **POST /post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/issue\_refund** method, or if marking a refund as sent with the **POST /post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/mark\_refund\_sent** method, the seller must use a separate **itemizedRefundDetail** container for each refund type, such as one for the purchase price, and one for original shipping.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#refundAmount)
 to learn which calls use refundAmount.

  

refundFeeType ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumerated value indicates the type of refund. When issuing a refund through the **POST /post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/issue\_refund** method, or if marking a refund as sent with the **POST /post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/mark\_refund\_sent** method, the seller must use a separate **itemizedRefundDetail** container for each refund type, such as one for the purchase price, and one for original shipping.  
  
The supported enumeration values representing refund fee types are defined in the [RefundFeeTypeEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order//devzone/post-order/types/RefundFeeTypeEnum.html)
 type definition.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#refundFeeType)
 to learn which calls use refundFeeType.

  

restockingFeePercentage ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

**THIS FIELD IS DEPRECATED. DO NOT USE.**

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#restockingFeePercentage)
 to learn which calls use restockingFeePercentage.

---

# ReturnUserRoleType - API Reference - Return Management API

eBay Return Management APIVersion 1.1.0

*   [Features Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/guides/ebayfeatures/index.html)
    
*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/Concepts/ReturnManagementAPIGuide.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/Concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/Concepts/index.html)
    
*   [Tutorials](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/HowTo/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ReturnUserRoleType ( [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#string)
 )
============================================================================================================================

Enumerated type that defines the user roles in a return.

Type that uses ReturnUserRoleType:

[ReturnUserType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/types/ReturnUserType.html)

Calls that use one or more values of ReturnUserRoleType:

[getReturnDetail](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/getReturnDetail.html)
, [getUserReturns](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/getUserReturns.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| BUYER | This value indicates that the user's role in the return is buyer. |
| EBAY | This value indicates that the user's role in the return is eBay. |
| OTHER | This value is reserved for future use. |
| SELLER | This value indicates that the user's role in the return is seller. |
| SYSTEM | This value indicates that the user's role in the return is system. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

# ShipmentStatusType - API Reference - Return Management API

eBay Return Management APIVersion 1.1.0

*   [Features Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/guides/ebayfeatures/index.html)
    
*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/Concepts/ReturnManagementAPIGuide.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/Concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/Concepts/index.html)
    
*   [Tutorials](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/HowTo/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ShipmentStatusType ( [token](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#token)
 )
==========================================================================================================================

Enumerated type that defines all possible shipment states relating to the buyer returning an item to the seller. The status of a buyer's return shipment is shown in the **ReturnDetail.buyerReturnShipment.shipmentStatus** field of the **getReturnDetail** response.

Type that uses ShipmentStatusType:

[ShipmentType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/types/ShipmentType.html)

Call that uses one or more values of ShipmentStatusType:

[getReturnDetail](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/getReturnDetail.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| ITEM\_DELIVERED | This value indicates that the returned item has been received by the seller. |
| ITEM\_SHIPPED | This value indicates that the item has been shipped by the buyer. |
| OTHER | This value is reserved for future use. |
| READY\_FOR\_SHIPPING | This value indicates that the item is ready to be return shipped by the buyer. |
| WAITING\_FOR\_SELLER\_INFO | This value indicates that the buyer is waiting for an Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) number and/or an alternative return shipping address before returning the item to the seller. A seller can provide a buyer with this information by using the **provideSellerInfo** call. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# UserFilterRoleType - API Reference - Return Management API

eBay Return Management APIVersion 1.1.0

*   [Features Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/guides/ebayfeatures/index.html)
    
*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/Concepts/ReturnManagementAPIGuide.html)

*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

UserFilterRoleType ( [string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#string)
 )
============================================================================================================================

Enumerated type that contains the valid values to use in the **otherUserFilter.role** field if a user filter is used in a **getUserReturns** request.

Type that uses UserFilterRoleType:

[UserFilterType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/types/UserFilterType.html)

Call that uses one or more values of UserFilterRoleType:

[getUserReturns](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/getUserReturns.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| BUYER | This value is specified in the **otherUserFilter.role** field to retrieve returns where the other user's role is buyer. |
| BUYERORSELLER | This value is specified in the **otherUserFilter.role** field to retrieve returns where the other user's role is buyer or seller. |
| SELLER | This value is specified in the **otherUserFilter.role** field to retrieve returns where the other user's role is seller. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

# RefundAmounts - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)

RefundAmounts
=============

This type provided details related to the expected and actual buyer refund amounts associated with an INR inquiry or case.

Types that use RefundAmounts:

[CaseDetails](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/CaseDetails.html)
, [InquiryDetails](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetails.html)

Calls that use RefundAmounts:

[/post-order/v2/casemanagement/{caseId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseid__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/inquiry/{inquiryId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_inquiry-inquiryid__get.html)

------

[buyerFinalAcceptRefundAmt](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/RefundAmounts.html#buyerFinalAcceptRefundAmt)

_ )

 ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ )

 ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ )

[feeCreditAmount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/RefundAmounts.html#feeCreditAmount)

 ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ )

[refundAmount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/RefundAmounts.html#refundAmount)
 ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ )

  
  

buyerFinalAcceptRefundAmt ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows the refund amount finally accepted by the buyer.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#buyerFinalAcceptRefundAmt)
 to learn which calls use buyerFinalAcceptRefundAmt.

  

buyerInitExpectRefundAmt ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows the refund amount initially expected by the buyer.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#buyerInitExpectRefundAmt)
 to learn which calls use buyerInitExpectRefundAmt.

  

donationAmount ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container defines the refund amount for listings that included a charitable donation. This data includes the amount of the charitable donation refunded, as well as currency conversion information when necessary including the current currency code, the value in the original currency, and the original currency's code.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#donationAmount)
 to learn which calls use donationAmount.

  

feeCreditAmount ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows the total amount of fees credited towards this refund as per eBay policy.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#feeCreditAmount)
 to learn which calls use feeCreditAmount.

  

internationalRefundAmount ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows the refund amount issued to the buyer for the international leg of a Global Shipping Program shipment. This container only applies for international orders where the seller used the Global Shipping Program to ship the order.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#internationalRefundAmount)
 to learn which calls use internationalRefundAmount.

  

refundAmount ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows the refund amount issued to the buyer.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#refundAmount)
 to learn which calls use refundAmount.

# ReturnAddress - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ReturnAddress
=============

This type provides the seller's return address and the Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) number associated with the item (if applicable).

Types that use ReturnAddress:

[CaseDetailsResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CaseDetailsResponse.html)
, [InquiryDetailsResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetailsResponse.html)

Calls that use ReturnAddress:

[/post-order/v2/casemanagement/{caseId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseid__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/inquiry/{inquiryId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_inquiry-inquiryid__get.html)

Fields
------

[address](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnAddress.html#address)
 ( _[Address](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Address.html)
_ )

[editable](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnAddress.html#editable)
 ( _[boolean](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#boolean)
_ )

[firstName](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnAddress.html#firstName)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[lastName](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnAddress.html#lastName)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[RMA](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnAddress.html#RMA)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

  
  

address ( _[Address](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Address.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows the full return address of the seller.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#address)
 to learn which calls use address.

  

editable ( _[boolean](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#boolean)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This boolean field indicates whether or not the seller's return address (shown in the **address** container) can be modified. A value of `true` indicates that the return address can be modified, and a value of `false` indicates that the return address cannot be modified.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#editable)
 to learn which calls use editable.

  

firstName ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The first name associated with the return address, or if applicable, a business or store name.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#firstName)
 to learn which calls use firstName.

  

lastName ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The last name associated with the return address. This field will only be returned if applicable.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#lastName)
 to learn which calls use lastName.

  

RMA ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) identifier authorizing this return. This field is only returned if an RMA number exists for the order line item.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#RMA)
 to learn which calls use RMA.

---

# CreateInquiryRequest - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

CreateInquiryRequest
====================

The base request type of the **POST /post-order/v2/inquiry** method, which is used to create an Item Not Received (INR) inquiry on behalf of the buyer.

Call that uses CreateInquiryRequest:

[/post-order/v2/inquiry POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_inquiry__post.html)

Fields
------

[claimQuantity](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CreateInquiryRequest.html#claimQuantity)
 ( _[integer](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#integer)
_ )

[comments](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CreateInquiryRequest.html#comments)
 ( _[Text](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Text.html)
_ )

[desiredOutcome](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CreateInquiryRequest.html#desiredOutcome)
 ( _[DesiredOutcomeTypeEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DesiredOutcomeTypeEnum.html)
_ )

[itemId](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CreateInquiryRequest.html#itemId)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[transactionId](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CreateInquiryRequest.html#transactionId)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

  
  

claimQuantity ( _[integer](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#integer)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This integer is the quantity of the line item purchased by the buyer. This value will usually be `1` unless the buyer purchased multiple quantity of a line item in a multiple-quantity, fixed-priced listing.  
  
If this field is omitted, its value defaults to `1`.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#claimQuantity)
 to learn which calls use claimQuantity.

  

comments ( _[Text](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Text.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container can be used if the buyer wants to provide more information about initiating the INR inquiry.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#comments)
 to learn which calls use comments.

  

desiredOutcome ( _[DesiredOutcomeTypeEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DesiredOutcomeTypeEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This field is used to indicate whether the buyer still wants the item (`STILL_WANT_ITEM` is passed in), or whether the buyer is now looking to receive a full refund (`FULL_REFUND` is passed in) for the line item even if it received by the buyer.  
  
If this field is omitted, the **desiredOutcome** value defaults to `STILL_WANT_ITEM`.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#desiredOutcome)
 to learn which calls use desiredOutcome.

  

itemId ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The unique identifier of the eBay listing where the line item was purchased. This field and the **transactionId** field are required in order to identify the line item for which an INR inquiry will be created.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#itemId)
 to learn which calls use itemId.

  

transactionId ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The unique identifier for the purchase of a item. This value is created right when the buyer is committed to buying the item, whether that buyer uses a 'Buy it Now' capability, is the winning bidder of an auction, or the buyer's Best Offer is accepted by the seller. This field and the **itemId** field are required in order to identify the line item for which an INR inquiry will be created.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#transactionId)
 to learn which calls use transactionId.

---

# ErrorCategory - API Reference - Business Policies Management API

eBay Business Policies Management APIVersion 1.0.0

*   [Features Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/guides/features-guide/default.html#features-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/Concepts/BusinessPoliciesAPIGuide.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/Concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/index.html)
    
*   [Tutorials](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/HowTo/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ErrorCategory ( [token](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#token)
 )
=====================================================================================================================

Returned errors are categorized as either Application, Request, or System errors. Request and application errors are often caused by passing invalid data in the call request. System errors are primarily caused by application failures and cannot be corrected by changing request values.

Type that uses ErrorCategory:

[ErrorData](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/types/ErrorData.html)

Calls that use one or more values of ErrorCategory:

[addSellerProfile](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/addSellerProfile.html)
, [consolidateShippingProfiles](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/consolidateShippingProfiles.html)
, [getConsolidationJobStatus](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/getConsolidationJobStatus.html)
, [getSellerProfiles](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/getSellerProfiles.html)
, [getVersion](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/getVersion.html)
, [removeOverrides](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/removeOverrides.html)
, [removeProfile](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/removeProfile.html)
, [removeSellerProfiles](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/removeSellerProfiles.html)
, [setSellerProfile](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/setSellerProfile.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| Application | An error occurred due to a problem with the request, with the most likely source being the application sending the request. For example, the request is missing a required data element or it contains an invalid field. The problem must be corrected before the request can be resent. Inspect the error message to find the cause of the problem. If the problem is due to an application error, modify the application and resend the request. If the error is due to invalid data, the source of the data must be corrected before you resend the resend request to eBay. |
| Request | An error occurred due to a problem with the request, with the most likely source being missing or invalid data in the request. The problem must be corrected before the request can be retried. Inspect the error message to find the cause of the problem. If the problem is a result of end user data, alert the end-user to the problem and provide the means for them to correct the problem. Once the problem is resolved, resend the request to eBay. |
| System | Indicates that an error has occurred on the eBay system side. For example, a database or server could be down. Inspect the error message to find the cause of the problem. If the problem is on the eBay side, an application can retry the request a reasonable number of times (eBay recommends twice). If the error persists, contact Developer Technical Support. Once the problem has been resolved, the request may be resent in its original form. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/business-policies/CallRef/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# ProductDetailsRequestType - API Reference - Product API

eBay Product APIVersion 1.6.0

*   [Features Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/guides/ebayfeatures/index.html)
    
*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/Concepts/ProductAPIGuide.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/Concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/Concepts/LandAPIRef.html)
    
*   [Tutorials](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/HowTo/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ProductDetailsRequestType
=========================

Container for request data for retrieving product details.

Type that uses ProductDetailsRequestType:

[GetProductDetailsRequest](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/GetProductDetailsRequest.html)

Call that uses ProductDetailsRequestType:

[getProductDetails](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/getProductDetails.html)

Fields
------

dataset ( _[token](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#token)
_ ) [\[0..\*\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This will define what are properties that will be returned for this catelog-enabled category.

**Dataset values:**

DisplayableProductDetails

Properies for use in a user interface to describe products.

DisplayableSearchResults

Properties for use in results for product searches.

Searchable

Properties for use in searches.

Sortable

Properties that are suitable for sorting.

User can either enter dataset name or enter individual property names (datasetPropertyName) from the dataset. Only one should be preset at a time.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/fieldindex.html#dataset)
 to learn which calls use dataset.

  

datasetPropertyName ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..\*\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

Individual property name from the dataset. You can either enter dataset name or enter individual property names from the dataset. Only one should be preset at a time.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/fieldindex.html#datasetPropertyName)
 to learn which calls use datasetPropertyName.

  

productIdentifier ( _[ProductIdentifier](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/ProductIdentifier.html)
_ ) [\[1\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The product identifier type and value. Product identifiers, such as ePID values or ISBN values, are unique across all sites.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/fieldindex.html#productIdentifier)
 to learn which calls use productIdentifier.

  

productStatusFilter ( _[ProductStatus](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/ProductStatus.html)
_ ) [\[0..1\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

Specifies whether or not to filter out the products which are disabled for selling on eBay, disabled for product reviews, or disabled for selling on half.com.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/fieldindex.html#productStatusFilter)
 to learn which calls use productStatusFilter.

---

# RefundFeeType - API Reference - Return Management API

eBay Return Management APIVersion 1.1.0

*   [Features Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/guides/ebayfeatures/index.html)
    
*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/Concepts/ReturnManagementAPIGuide.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/Concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/Concepts/index.html)
    
*   [Tutorials](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/HowTo/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

RefundFeeType ( [token](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#token)
 )
=====================================================================================================================

Enumerated type that defines the types of itemized refunds.

Type that uses RefundFeeType:

[ItemizedRefundDetailType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/types/ItemizedRefundDetailType.html)

Calls that use one or more values of RefundFeeType:

[getReturnDetail](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/getReturnDetail.html)
, [issueRefund](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/issueRefund.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| ORIGINAL\_SHIPPING | This value indicates that the refund to the buyer is for the original shipping costs of the item, or items (for multiple quantity purchases). |
| OTHER | This value is reserved for future use. |
| PURCHASE\_PRICE | This value indicates that the refund to the buyer is for the purchase price of the item, or items (for multiple quantity purchases). |
| RESTOCKING\_FEE | This is the only **RefundFeeType** value that will be a negative dollar value, as a restocking fee is a charge against the buyer for returning the item. In order to enforce a restocking fee on an item, the seller must include a restocking fee value as part of the listing's return policy. In the listing APIs, this field is **Item.ReturnPolicy.RestockingFeeValue**. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# ReturnType - API Reference - Return Management API

eBay Return Management APIVersion 1.1.0

*   [Features Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/guides/ebayfeatures/index.html)
    
*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/Concepts/ReturnManagementAPIGuide.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/Concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/Concepts/index.html)
    
*   [Tutorials](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/HowTo/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ReturnType ( [token](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#token)
 )
==================================================================================================================

Enumerated type that defines the return types that are possible. Through the Return Center, the buyer selects whether he/she wants to be refunded for the purchase or wants a replacement item.

Type that uses ReturnType:

[ReturnSummaryType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/types/ReturnSummaryType.html)

Calls that use one or more values of ReturnType:

[getReturnDetail](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/getReturnDetail.html)
, [getUserReturns](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/getUserReturns.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| MONEY\_BACK | This value indicates that the buyer is returning/has returned the item for a refund. |
| REPLACEMENT | This value indicates that the buyer is requesting/has received a replacement item for the original item. |
| UNKNOWN | This value is only returned if client/user is running a version of the Return Management API that is out-of-date, and does not contain the latest values of **ReturnType**. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/return-management/CallRef/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# CaseDetailsResponse - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)

CaseDetailsResponse
===================

The base response type for the **GET /post-order/v2/casemanagement/{caseId}** method. This type contains detailed information about an INR or Return case.

Call that uses CaseDetailsResponse:

[/post-order/v2/casemanagement/{caseId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseid__get.html)

_ )
