_ )

  
  

actionDeadlines ( _[ActionDeadlines](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ActionDeadlines.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container provides the number of remaining days that a buyer or seller has before being required to take action on an INR or Return case.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#actionDeadlines)
 to learn which calls use actionDeadlines.

  

appealDetails ( _[AppealDetails](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/AppealDetails.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container consists of information related to the appeal of a case decision. This container is only returned if the case decision was appealed by the buyer or seller.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#appealDetails)
 to learn which calls use appealDetails.

  

buyerClosureReason ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration value indicates why the buyer chose to close the case. This field is only returned if the buyer closed the case, or if the case was closed on behalf of the buyer.  
  
The list of enumeration values that may be returned in this field are defined in the [CaseCloseReasonEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order//devzone/post-order/types/CaseCloseReasonEnum.html)
 type definition.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#buyerClosureReason)
 to learn which calls use buyerClosureReason.

  

buyerProtectedProgramLink ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This string value is the URL for the eBay Resolution Center.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#buyerProtectedProgramLink)
 to learn which calls use buyerProtectedProgramLink.

  

caseContentOnHold ( _[boolean](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#boolean)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This field indicates the item content related to the case is hidden (the respective content is not returned). This field is returned as 'true' if the corresponding case content is on hold due to eBay policy violation; false otherwise.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#caseContentOnHold)
 to learn which calls use caseContentOnHold.

  

caseDetails ( _[CaseDetails](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CaseDetails.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container provides detailed information about the case.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#caseDetails)
 to learn which calls use caseDetails.

  

caseHistoryDetails ( _[ClaimHistoryResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ClaimHistoryResponse.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container provides detailed information about the history of the case, including each action that has been performed on the case.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#caseHistoryDetails)
 to learn which calls use caseHistoryDetails.

  

caseId ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The unique identifier of an INR or Return case.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#caseId)
 to learn which calls use caseId.

  

caseQuantity ( _[integer](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#integer)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This integer value indicates the quantity of the line item purchased by the buyer.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#caseQuantity)
 to learn which calls use caseQuantity.

  

caseType ( _[CaseTypeEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CaseTypeEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration type indicates if the case involves an item that has not been received by the buyer within the expected delivery window, or if the case involves a return request that has been escalated into a case by the buyer or seller after they were unable to come up with a return solution that would work for both parties.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#caseType)
 to learn which calls use caseType.

  

claimAmount ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container displays the dollar value of the case, which is generally the amount of the refund that the buyer will receive if the buyer wins the case, or if the seller voluntarily refunds the buyer.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#claimAmount)
 to learn which calls use claimAmount.

  

creationDate ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The timestamp in this container indicates when the case was created.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#creationDate)
 to learn which calls use creationDate.

  

escalatedBy ( _[UserPartyEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/UserPartyEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration value indicates the party that escalated the INR inquiry or return request into a case.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#escalatedBy)
 to learn which calls use escalatedBy.

  

escalateReason ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

Indicates why the buyer or seller escalated an INR inquiry or a return request into a case.  
  
For an INR inquiry that was escalated, the applicable values are defined in the [InquiryEscalationReasonEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order//devzone/post-order/types/InquiryEscalationReasonEnum.html)
 type definition. type.  
  
For a return request that was escalated, the applicable values are defined in the [EscalateReasonEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order//devzone/post-order/types/EscalateReasonEnum.html)
 type definition.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#escalateReason)
 to learn which calls use escalateReason.

  

eventTicketsLink ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This string value is the URL for the event tickets page, where electronic event tickets can be downloaded by the purchaser. This field is only returned if the case involves an event tickets order.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#eventTicketsLink)
 to learn which calls use eventTicketsLink.

  

extTransactionId ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This string value is the unique identifier of the payment transaction for the order. This field will only be returned if the payment transaction happened outside of eBay's system.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#extTransactionId)
 to learn which calls use extTransactionId.

  

fsnadDaysToAddTrackingAfterShippingItem ( _[integer](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#integer)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This integer value indicates the number of days that the buyer has to provide shipment tracking information for an item that is being returned to the seller.  
  
This field is only returned for Return cases, and only if the buyer is being required to provide shipment tracking information for the item being returned.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#fsnadDaysToAddTrackingAfterShippingItem)
 to learn which calls use fsnadDaysToAddTrackingAfterShippingItem.

  

fsnadShipToSellerByDate ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The timestamp in this container indicates the deadline when the buyer must ship the return item back to the seller. This container is only returned for Return cases, and only if the buyer has yet to ship the return item, or has not provided proof that the item has been shipped.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#fsnadShipToSellerByDate)
 to learn which calls use fsnadShipToSellerByDate.

  

initiator ( _[UserPartyEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/UserPartyEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration value indicates whether the buyer or the seller initiated the INR inquiry or Return request that has been escalated to a case. This value will usually be `BUYER`.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#initiator)
 to learn which calls use initiator.

  

itemId ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The unique identifier of the eBay listing where the line item was purchased. This field is used in conjunction with the **transactionId** field to identify a line item that is associated with the case.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#itemId)
 to learn which calls use itemId.

  

itemOnHold ( _[boolean](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#boolean)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This field indicates the item related to the case is hidden (the respective content is not returned). This field is returned as 'true' if the corresponding item is on hold due to eBay policy violation; false otherwise.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#itemOnHold)
 to learn which calls use itemOnHold.

  

lastModifiedDate ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The timestamp in this container indicates when the last action was performed on the case.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#lastModifiedDate)
 to learn which calls use lastModifiedDate.

  

payForItemLink ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This string value is the URL for the purchase item page. This field will be returned if available/applicable.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#payForItemLink)
 to learn which calls use payForItemLink.

  

priceSignatureConfirmationAmount ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This string value indicates the dollar value threshold for the signature confirmation add-on. The buyer must purchase the signature confirmation add-on for high-value items at or above this dollar value.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#priceSignatureConfirmationAmount)
 to learn which calls use priceSignatureConfirmationAmount.

  

recalledItemLink ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This string is the URL for the recalled item page. This field will be returned if available/applicable.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#recalledItemLink)
 to learn which calls use recalledItemLink.

  

returnDetails ( _[ReturnAddress](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnAddress.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container consists of information related to a buyer returning a line item to the seller, and includes the seller's return address and the RMA number (if applicable).  
  
This container is only returned if the case type is a Return.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#returnDetails)
 to learn which calls use returnDetails.

  

returnId ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The unique identifier of a return. This field is only returned if the case type is a Return.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#returnId)
 to learn which calls use returnId.

  

sellerClosureReason ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration value indicates why the seller chose to close the case. This field is only returned if the seller closed the case, or if the case was closed on behalf of the seller.  
  
The list of enumeration values that may be returned in this field are defined in the [CaseCloseReasonEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order//devzone/post-order/types/CaseCloseReasonEnum.html)
 type definition.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#sellerClosureReason)
 to learn which calls use sellerClosureReason.

  

shippingFee ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container displays the expected return shipping fees. Depending on the case type and the details of the case type, the return shipping fees may be paid by the buyer or the seller. amount that the buyer  
  
This container is only returned if the case is expected to involve the buyer returning the item to the seller.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#shippingFee)
 to learn which calls use shippingFee.

  

status ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration value indicates the current status of the case.  
  
The list of enumeration values that may be returned in this field are defined in the [CaseStatusEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order//devzone/post-order/types/CaseStatusEnum.html)
 type definition.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#status)
 to learn which calls use status.

  

transactionId ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The unique identifier of the purchase transaction. This value is created right when the buyer is committed to buying the item, whether that buyer uses a 'Buy it Now' capability, is the winning bidder of an auction, or the buyer's Best Offer is accepted by the seller. This field is used in conjunction with the **itemId** field to identify the line item that is associated with the case.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#transactionId)
 to learn which calls use transactionId.

---

# GetCancelDetailResponse - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

GetCancelDetailResponse
=======================

This type defines the response payload for the **GET /post-order/v2/cancellation/{cancelId}** method. This method returns the details of the cancellation request specified by the _cancelId_ path parameter of the request.

Call that uses GetCancelDetailResponse:

[/post-order/v2/cancellation/{cancelId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_cancellation-cancelid__get.html)

Field
-----

cancelDetail ( _[CancelDetail](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CancelDetail.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

Contains information about a cancelled order. If the value of the **fieldgroups** query parameter is set to `FULL`, the response also contains a record of all activity performed on the cancellation request plus the identifiers for each line item in the order.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#cancelDetail)
 to learn which calls use cancelDetail.

---

Product API

*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/Concepts/ProductAPIGuide.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/Concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/index.html)
    
*   [Tutorials](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/HowTo/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

eBay Site ID to Global ID Mapping
=================================

Each eBay site maps to a unique [eBay global ID](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/Enums/GlobalIdList.html)
. You must specify a global ID in the `X-EBAY-SOA-GLOBAL-ID` HTTP header for each API call. The global ID you use must correspond to one of the eBay site IDs in the following table:

| eBay Site ID | Site Name | Global ID |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 0   | eBay United States | EBAY-US |
| 2   | eBay Canada (English) | EBAY-ENCA |
| 3   | eBay UK | EBAY-GB |
| 15  | eBay Australia | EBAY-AU |
| 16  | eBay Austria | EBAY-AT |
| 23  | eBay Belgium (French) | EBAY-FRBE |
| 71  | eBay France | EBAY-FR |
| 77  | eBay Germany | EBAY-DE |
| 100 | eBay Motors | EBAY-MOTOR |
| 101 | eBay Italy | EBAY-IT |
| 123 | eBay Belgium (Dutch) | EBAY-NLBE |
| 146 | eBay Netherlands | EBAY-NL |
| 186 | eBay Spain | EBAY-ES |
| 193 | eBay Switzerland | EBAY-CH |
| 201 | eBay Hong Kong | EBAY-HK |
| 203 | eBay India | EBAY-IN |
| 205 | eBay Ireland | EBAY-IE |
| 207 | eBay Malaysia | EBAY-MY |
| 210 | eBay Canada (French) | EBAY-FRCA |
| 211 | eBay Philippines | EBAY-PH |
| 212 | eBay Poland | EBAY-PL |
| 216 | eBay Singapore | EBAY-SG |

---

productSearch ( _[ProductRequest](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product/CallRef/types/ProductRequest.html)

# BaseServiceResponse - API Reference - Product Metadata API

eBay Product Metadata APIVersion 1.7.0

*   [Features Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/guides/ebayfeatures/index.html)
    
*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/Product/Concepts/ProductAPIGuide.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/Product/Concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/Product/Concepts/LandAPIRef.html)
    
*   [Tutorials](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product-metadata/HowTo/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product-metadata/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

BaseServiceResponse
===================

Base response container for all service operations. Contains error information associated with the request.

Calls that use BaseServiceResponse:

[getCompatibilitySearchDataVersion](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/getCompatibilitySearchDataVersion.html)
, [getCompatibilitySearchNames](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/getCompatibilitySearchNames.html)
, [getCompatibilitySearchValues](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/getCompatibilitySearchValues.html)
, [getCompatibilitySearchValuesBulk](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/getCompatibilitySearchValuesBulk.html)

Fields
------

ack ( _[AckValue](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/types/AckValue.html)
_ ) [\[1\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

Indicates whether or not errors or warnings were generated during the processing of the request.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/fieldindex.html#ack)
 to learn which calls use ack.

  

errorMessage ( _[ErrorMessage](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/types/ErrorMessage.html)
_ ) [\[0..1\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

Description of an error or warning that occurred when eBay processed the request. Not returned if the ack value is Success.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/fieldindex.html#errorMessage)
 to learn which calls use errorMessage.

  

timestamp ( _[dateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#dateTime)
_ ) [\[0..1\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This value represents the date and time when eBay processed the request. This value is returned in GMT, the ISO 8601 date and time format (YYYY- MM- DDTHH:MM:SS.SSSZ). See the "dateTime" type for information about the time format, and for details on converting to and from the GMT time zone.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/fieldindex.html#timestamp)
 to learn which calls use timestamp.

  

version ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..1\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The release version that eBay used to process the request. Developer Technical Support may ask you for the version value if you work with them to troubleshoot issues.  
  
**Note:** The version in use is normally the latest release version, as specified in the release notes. Note that eBay releases the API to international sites about a week after the API version is released to the US site.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/fieldindex.html#version)
 to learn which calls use version.

---

# ClaimHistoryResponse - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ClaimHistoryResponse
====================

This type is used to provide the history of events associated with an INR inquiry or a case.

Types that use ClaimHistoryResponse:

[CaseDetailsResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/CaseDetailsResponse.html)
, [InquiryDetailsResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/InquiryDetailsResponse.html)

Calls that use ClaimHistoryResponse:

[/post-order/v2/casemanagement/{caseId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseid__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/inquiry/{inquiryId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_inquiry-inquiryid__get.html)

Fields
------

history ( array of _[ClaimHistoryEventModel](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ClaimHistoryEventModel.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This array contains one or more events or actions associated with an INR inquiry or a case.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#history)
 to learn which calls use history.

  

shipmentTrackingDetails ( _[ShipmentTrackingDetailType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ShipmentTrackingDetailType.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container will show detailed shipment tracking information if an INR item is being shipped to the buyer, or if the buyer is returning an item to the seller. This container is only returned if shipment tracking is currently relevant to the inquiry or case.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#shipmentTrackingDetails)
 to learn which calls use shipmentTrackingDetails.

---

# PartyEnum - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

PartyEnum
=========

This enumeration type lists the eBay user types that can create or perform an action against an order cancellation request.

Types that use PartyEnum:

[CancelActivityHistory](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/CancelActivityHistory.html)
, [CancelDetail](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/CancelDetail.html)
, [CancelSummary](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/CancelSummary.html)

Calls that use one or more values of PartyEnum:

[/post-order/v2/cancellation/search GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_cancellation_search__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/cancellation/{cancelId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_cancellation-cancelid__get.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| BUYER | This enumeration value is returned if the buyer created or performed an action on an order cancellation request. |
| SELLER | This enumeration value is returned if the seller created or performed an action on an order cancellation request. |
| UNKNOWN | This enumeration value is returned if eBay cannot determine which eBay party created or performed an action on an order cancellation request. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# ReturnAddressType - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ReturnAddressType
=================

This type is used to provide the address where a return item will be shipped.

Types that use ReturnAddressType:

[ResponseHistoryAttributesType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ResponseHistoryAttributesType.html)
, [ReturnDetailType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnDetailType.html)
, [ShipmentTrackingType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ShipmentTrackingType.html)

Calls that use ReturnAddressType:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)

Fields
------

address ( _[Address](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Address.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container holds the address where a return item will be shipped.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#address)
 to learn which calls use address.

  

name ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The name/business name associated with the address

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#name)
 to learn which calls use name.

# CancelActivityHistory - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

CancelActivityHistory
=====================

This type is used to provide activity history on the order cancellation request returned in a **GET /post-order/v2/cancellation/{cancelId}** response. The activity history of an order cancellation request will be returned unless the **fieldgroups** query parameter is used and set to `SUMMARY` **activityHistories**.

Type that uses CancelActivityHistory:

[CancelDetail](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CancelDetail.html)

Call that uses CancelActivityHistory:

[/post-order/v2/cancellation/{cancelId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_cancellation-cancelid__get.html)

Fields
------

[actionDate](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CancelActivityHistory.html#actionDate)
 ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ )

[activityParty](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CancelActivityHistory.html#activityParty)
 ( _[PartyEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/PartyEnum.html)
_ )

[activityType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CancelActivityHistory.html#activityType)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[stateFrom](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CancelActivityHistory.html#stateFrom)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

[stateTo](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CancelActivityHistory.html#stateTo)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

  
  

actionDate ( _[DateTime](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DateTime.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The timestamp in this container provides the date and time when the order cancellation request activity occurred.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#actionDate)
 to learn which calls use actionDate.

  

activityParty ( _[PartyEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/PartyEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration value indicates the party (buyer or seller) who performed the action on the order cancellation request.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#activityParty)
 to learn which calls use activityParty.

  

activityType ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration value indicates the type of event or action that occurred with the order cancellation request.  
  
The list of enumeration values that may be returned in this field are defined in the [CancelActivityTypeEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order//devzone/post-order/types/CancelActivityTypeEnum.html)
 type definition.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#activityType)
 to learn which calls use activityType.

  

stateFrom ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration value indicates the state of the order cancellation request prior to the performed action (defined in the **activityType** field).  
  
The list of enumeration values that may be returned in this field are defined in the [CancelStateEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order//devzone/post-order/types/CancelStateEnum.html)
 type definition.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#stateFrom)
 to learn which calls use stateFrom.

  

stateTo ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumeration value indicates state of the order cancellation request following the performed action (defined in the **activityType** field). Depending on the type of activity, the state of the order cancellation process might not change, so it is possible that the **stateTo** value may be the same as the **stateFrom** value.  
  
The list of enumeration values that may be returned in this field are defined in the [CancelStateEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order//devzone/post-order/types/CancelStateEnum.html)
 type definition.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#stateTo)
 to learn which calls use stateTo.

---

# ReturnHoldStatusEnum - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ReturnHoldStatusEnum
====================

This enumerated type lists the possible states of a return request that has been put on hold.

Type that uses ReturnHoldStatusEnum:

[ReturnHoldInfoType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ReturnHoldInfoType.html)

Calls that use one or more values of ReturnHoldStatusEnum:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| HOLD\_CREATION\_SUCCESS | This enumeration value indicates that the hold placed on the return request was created successfully. |
| HOLD\_RELEASE\_FAILED | This enumeration value indicates that the attempt to release the hold on the return request failed. |
| HOLD\_RELEASE\_SUCCESS | This enumeration value indicates that the hold on the return request was released successfully. |
| INELIGIBLE\_TO\_RELEASE\_HOLD | This enumeration value indicates that the hold on the return request is not yet eligible to be released. |
| OTHER | This enumeration value indicates that the status of the hold on the return request is not classified or is unknown. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# TrackingStatusEnum - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

TrackingStatusEnum
==================

This enumerated type lists the values that indicate whether the return item was delivered or still in-transit.

Type that uses TrackingStatusEnum:

[ShipmentTrackingType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ShipmentTrackingType.html)

Calls that use one or more values of TrackingStatusEnum:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| CANCELLED | This enumeration value indicates that the current shipment tracking information has been cancelled. |
| CREATED | This enumeration value indicates that shipment tracking has been initiated. |
| DELIVERED | This enumeration value indicates that the item was delivered according to the shipment tracking history. |
| IN\_TRANSIT | This enumeration value indicates that the item is in-transit to the recipient according to the shipment tracking history. |
| UNKNOWN | This enumeration value indicates that shipment tracking status of the item is unknown. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# RefundInfoType - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

RefundInfoType
==============

This type is used by the **refundInfo** container, which provides detailed information on the estimated and actual refund amounts.

Type that uses RefundInfoType:

[ReturnDetailType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ReturnDetailType.html)

Calls that use RefundInfoType:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)

Fields
------

actualRefundDetail ( _[ActualRefundDetailType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ActualRefundDetailType.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows the itemized refund information after the seller issues a refund to the buyer. This container is only returned if the seller has issued a refund to the buyer. Until the refund is actually successfully processed, only information on the estimated refund may be seen in the **estimatedRefundDetail** container.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#actualRefundDetail)
 to learn which calls use actualRefundDetail.

  

estimatedRefundDetail ( _[EstimatedRefundDetailType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/EstimatedRefundDetailType.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows estimated refund information for the buyer. There will be one **itemizedRefundDetail** container returned under this container for each refund fee type (such as purchase price and original shipping).

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#estimatedRefundDetail)
 to learn which calls use estimatedRefundDetail.

---

# ReturnUserRoleEnum - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

ReturnUserRoleEnum
==================

This enumerated type lists all possible roles for parties involved in a return request, such as buyer, seller, and eBay.

Types that use ReturnUserRoleEnum:

[ReturnFileType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ReturnFileType.html)
, [ReturnResponseHistoryType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ReturnResponseHistoryType.html)
, [ShipmentTrackingType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ShipmentTrackingType.html)
, [ShipmentType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/ShipmentType.html)

Calls that use one or more values of ReturnUserRoleEnum:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/files GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid_files__get.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| BUYER | This enumeration value indicates that the buyer performed the action on the return request. |
| EBAY | This enumeration value indicates that eBay customer support performed the action on the return request. |
| OTHER | This enumeration value indicates that it is unknown who/what performed the action on the return request. |
| SELLER | This enumeration value indicates that the seller performed the action on the return request. |
| SYSTEM | This enumeration value indicates that the action on the return request was an automated action initiated by eBay's system. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# InquirySearchResponse - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

InquirySearchResponse
=====================

The base response type of the **GET /post-order/v2/inquiry/search** method, which is used to retrieve INR inquiries based on filter criteria in the request.

Call that uses InquirySearchResponse:

[/post-order/v2/inquiry/search GET](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_inquiry_search__get.html)

Fields
------

members ( array of _[InquirySummaryType](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/InquirySummaryType.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

An array of one or more INR inquiries that match the filter criteria in request.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#members)
 to learn which calls use members.

  

paginationOutput ( _[PaginationOutput](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/PaginationOutput.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container consists of metadata related to the current page of results. It shows the total number of INR inquiries that match the filter criteria, the total number of INR inquiries to show per page of results, and the total number of pages in the results set.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#paginationOutput)
 to learn which calls use paginationOutput.

  

totalNumberOfInquiries ( _[integer](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#integer)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This integer value indicates the total number of INR inquiries that were found based on the input filter(s) in the request.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#totalNumberOfInquiries)
 to learn which calls use totalNumberOfInquiries.

---

# DecisionEnum - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

DecisionEnum
============

This enumerated type lists all values that can be passed in the **decision** field of the **POST /post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/decide** request. With the values supported in the **decision** field, the seller can offer the return option to the buyer, approve or decline a return request, offer a partial refund to the buyer, or provide a Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) number to the buyer. There are only a few supported values for a buyer, and these are discussed in the descriptions below.

Type that uses DecisionEnum:

[DecideReturnRequest](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/DecideReturnRequest.html)

Call that uses one or more values of DecisionEnum:

[/post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/decide POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid_decide__post.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| ACCEPT\_PARTIAL\_REFUND | Pass this value in the **decision** field if the buyer wants to accept the seller's partial refund amount. This value is not applicable if the seller is making the call. |
| ACCEPT\_REPLACEMENT\_OFFER | Pass this value in the **decision** field if the buyer wants to accept the seller's offer to replace the item. This value is not applicable if the seller is making the call.<br><br>**Note:** This value is not currently supported, and an error will occur if it is used. |
| APPROVE | Pass this value in the **decision** field if the seller wants to approve the buyer's return request.  <br>  <br>If the seller is opted-in to the RMA number program, they can populate the **RMANumber** field at the same time as they approve the return request, or they can provide the RMA number at a later time with a second call to **POST /return/{returnId}/decide** (where the **decision** field is set to `PROVIDE_RMA`). Note that you should not set **RMANumber** to null if you are using eBay shipping labels. |
| APPROVE\_WITHOUT\_EBAY\_LABEL | **THIS VALUE IS DEPRECATED.** |
| DECLINE | Pass this value in the **decision** field if the seller wants to decline the buyer's return request. |
| DECLINE\_PARTIAL\_REFUND | Pass this value in the **decision** field if the buyer wants to decline the seller's partial refund amount. This value is not applicable if the seller is making the call. |
| DECLINE\_REPLACEMENT\_OFFER | Pass this value in the **decision** field if the buyer wants to decline the seller's offer to replace the item. This value is not applicable if the seller is making the call.<br><br>**Note:** This value is not currently supported, and an error will occur if it is used. |
| OFFER\_PARTIAL\_REFUND | Pass this value in the **decision** field if the seller wants to offer the buyer a partial refund. |
| OFFER\_REPLACEMENT | Pass this value in the **decision** field if the seller wants to offer the buyer a replacement of the item instead of a refund.<br><br>**Note:** This value is not currently supported, and an error will occur if it is used. |
| OFFER\_RETURN | Pass this value in the **decision** field if the seller wants to offer the buyer the opportunity to return the item. |
| OFFER\_RETURN\_WITHOUT\_LABEL | **THIS VALUE IS DEPRECATED.** |
| PROVIDE\_RMA | Pass this value in the **decision** field if the seller is providing a Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) number to the buyer. When the **decision** field is set to this value, you must also provide the RMA number in the **RMANumber** field. |
| UNKNOWN | **Note:** This value is deprecated. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# GetDetailResponse - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

GetDetailResponse
=================

This type provides details on a return request that is returned in the **POST /post-order/v2/return** and **GET /post-order/v2/return/{returnId}** responses.

Type that uses GetDetailResponse:

[CreateReturnResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/CreateReturnResponse.html)

Calls that use GetDetailResponse:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)

Fields
------

detail ( _[ReturnDetailType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnDetailType.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container consists of detailed information on the return request. This container is not returned if the **fieldgroups** query parameter is omitted, or if it is used and its value is set to `SUMMARY` or `NONE`.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#detail)
 to learn which calls use detail.

  

summary ( _[ReturnSummaryType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnSummaryType.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container consists of summarized information on the return request. This container is not returned if the **fieldgroups** query parameter is omitted, or if it is used and its value is set to `FULL` or `NONE`.'

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#summary)
 to learn which calls use summary.

---

# EstimatedRefundType - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

EstimatedRefundType
===================

This type is used by the **estimatedRefundDetail.itemizedRefundDetail** container, which shows the estimated refund information before the seller issues a refund to the buyer. Once the refund is actually successfully processed, information on the refund may be seen in the **actualRefundDetail** container.

Type that uses EstimatedRefundType:

[EstimatedRefundDetailType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/EstimatedRefundDetailType.html)

Calls that use EstimatedRefundType:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)

Fields
------

[estimatedAmount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/EstimatedRefundType.html#estimatedAmount)
 ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ )

[maxAmount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/EstimatedRefundType.html#maxAmount)
 ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ )

[minAmount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/EstimatedRefundType.html#minAmount)
 ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ )

[purchasePriceDeductedPercentageList](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/EstimatedRefundType.html#purchasePriceDeductedPercentageList)
 ( array of _[integer](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#integer)
_ )

[refundFeeType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/EstimatedRefundType.html#refundFeeType)
 ( _[RefundFeeTypeEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/RefundFeeTypeEnum.html)
_ )

[restockingFeePercentage](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/EstimatedRefundType.html#restockingFeePercentage)
 ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ )

  
  

estimatedAmount ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows the estimated amount of the refund.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#estimatedAmount)
 to learn which calls use estimatedAmount.

  

maxAmount ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows the maximum amount that the refund could be based on the cost of the order.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#maxAmount)
 to learn which calls use maxAmount.

  

minAmount ( _[Amount](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Amount.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container shows the minimum amount that the refund could be based on the cost of the order.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#minAmount)
 to learn which calls use minAmount.

  

purchasePriceDeductedPercentageList ( array of _[integer](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#integer)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This array shows one or more percentage values, and these values indicate the percentage value(s) deducted off of the purchase price.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#purchasePriceDeductedPercentageList)
 to learn which calls use purchasePriceDeductedPercentageList.

  

refundFeeType ( _[RefundFeeTypeEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/RefundFeeTypeEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This enumerated value indicates the type of refund. When issuing a refund through the **POST /post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/issue\_refund** method, the seller must use a separate **itemizedRefundDetail** container for each refund type, such as one for the purchase price, one for original shipping, and one for a restocking fee (if applicable).

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#refundFeeType)
 to learn which calls use refundFeeType.

  

restockingFeePercentage ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

**THIS FIELD IS DEPRECATED.**

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#restockingFeePercentage)
 to learn which calls use restockingFeePercentage.

# Global ID Values - Product API

Product API

*   [Features Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/guides/features-guide/default.html#features-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/Concepts/ProductAPIGuide.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/Concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/index.html)
    
*   [Tutorials](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/HowTo/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

Global ID Values ([string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/CallRef/types/simpleTypes.html)
 )
========================================================================================================

The Global ID is a unique identifier for combinations of site, language, and territory. Global ID values are returned in **globalId** and are used as input for the X-EBAY-SOA-GLOBAL-ID header. The global ID you use must correspond to an eBay site with a valid site ID. See [eBay Site ID to Global ID Mapping](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product/Concepts/SiteIDToGlobalID.html)
 for a list of global IDs you can use with the API calls.

**Enumeration Values (active sites only)**

| Global ID | Language | Territory | Site Name | eBay Site ID |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| EBAY-AT | de-AT | AT  | eBay Austria | 16  |
| EBAY-AU | en-AU | AU  | eBay Australia | 15  |
| EBAY-CH | de-CH | CH  | eBay Switzerland | 193 |
| EBAY-DE | en-DE | DE  | eBay Germany | 77  |
| EBAY-ENCA | en-CA | CA  | eBay Canada (English) | 2   |
| EBAY-ES | es-ES | ES  | eBay Spain | 186 |
| EBAY-FR | fr-FR | FR  | eBay France | 71  |
| EBAY-FRBE | fr-BE | BE  | eBay Belgium (French) | 23  |
| EBAY-FRCA | fr-CA | CA  | eBay Canada (French) | 210 |
| EBAY-GB | en-GB | GB  | eBay UK | 3   |
| EBAY-HK | zh-Hant | HK  | eBay Hong Kong | 201 |
| EBAY-IE | en-IE | IE  | eBay Ireland | 205 |
| EBAY-IN | en-IN | IN  | eBay India | 203 |
| EBAY-IT | it-IT | IT  | eBay Italy | 101 |
| EBAY-MOTOR | en-US | US  | eBay Motors | 100 |
| EBAY-MY | en-MY | MY  | eBay Malaysia | 207 |
| EBAY-NL | nl-NL | NL  | eBay Netherlands | 146 |
| EBAY-NLBE | nl-BE | BE  | eBay Belgium (Dutch) | 123 |
| EBAY-NZ (reserved for future use) | en-NZ | NZ  | eBay New Zealand | N/A |
| EBAY-PH | en-PH | PH  | eBay Philippines | 211 |
| EBAY-PL | pl-PL | PL  | eBay Poland | 212 |
| EBAY-SG | en-SG | SG  | eBay Singapore | 216 |
| EBAY-US | en-US | US  | eBay United States | 0   |

---

# FundingMethodBrandEnum - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

FundingMethodBrandEnum
======================

This enumeration type lists the possible credit card brands that can be used by eBay to fund a seller's refund to a buyer. This type is only applicable if a buyer refund will be funded using a seller's credit card as the funding source.

Types that use FundingMethodBrandEnum:

[FundingSource](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/FundingSource.html)
, [FundingSourceType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/FundingSourceType.html)

Calls that use one or more values of FundingMethodBrandEnum:

[/post-order/v2/cancellation/{cancelId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_cancellation-cancelid__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/casemanagement/{caseId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_casemanagement-caseid__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/inquiry/{inquiryId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_inquiry-inquiryid__get.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)
, [/post-order/v2/return/{returnId} GET](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid__get.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| AMERICAN\_EXPRESS | This enumeration value indicates that a American Express credit card will be used to fund the refund to the buyer. |
| DISCOVER | This enumeration value indicates that a Discover credit card will be used to fund the refund to the buyer. |
| MASTERCARD | This enumeration value indicates that a Mastercard credit card will be used to fund the refund to the buyer. |
| VISA | This enumeration value indicates that a Visa credit card will be used to fund the refund to the buyer. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# AckValue - API Reference - Product Metadata API

eBay Product Metadata APIVersion 1.7.0

*   [Features Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/guides/ebayfeatures/index.html)
    
*   [Users Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/Product/Concepts/ProductAPIGuide.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/Product/Concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/Product/Concepts/LandAPIRef.html)
    
*   [Tutorials](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product-metadata/HowTo/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product-metadata/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

AckValue ( [string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/types/simpletypes.html#string)
 )
=================================================================================================================

Indicates whether the error is a severe error (causing the request to fail) or an informational error (a warning) that should be communicated to the user.

Type that uses AckValue:

[BaseServiceResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/types/BaseServiceResponse.html)

Calls that use one or more values of AckValue:

[getCompatibilitySearchDataVersion](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/getCompatibilitySearchDataVersion.html)
, [getCompatibilitySearchNames](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/getCompatibilitySearchNames.html)
, [getCompatibilitySearchValues](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/getCompatibilitySearchValues.html)
, [getCompatibilitySearchValuesBulk](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/getCompatibilitySearchValuesBulk.html)

Enumeration Values
------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Value | Description |
| Failure | The request that triggered the error was not processed successfully. When a serious application-level error occurs, the error is returned instead of the business data. |
| PartialFailure | The request that triggered the error was processed successfully but with some warnings. |
| Success | The request was processed successfully, but something occurred that may affect your application or the user. |
| Warning | The request that triggered the error was processed successfully but with some warnings. |

  \* See the [Enumeration Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/product-metadata/CallRef/enumindex.html)
 to see exact use of each enumeration value in the API.

---

# AppealDetails - API Reference - Post-Order API

AppealDetails
