# CreateReturnResponse - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

CreateReturnResponse
====================

The base response type of the **POST /post-order/v2/return/create** method, which is used to create a return request.

Call that uses CreateReturnResponse:

[/post-order/v2/return POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return__post.html)

Fields
------

detail ( _[GetDetailResponse](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/GetDetailResponse.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container consists of detailed information on the return request. This container will not be returned if the **fieldGroups** query parameter is used and its value is set to `SUMMARY` or `NONE`.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#detail)
 to learn which calls use detail.

  

eligibilityResult ( _[ReturnEligibilityPerItemType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnEligibilityPerItemType.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container consists of information on the return item and the results for each eligibility check type that was run against the order line item.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#eligibilityResult)
 to learn which calls use eligibilityResult.

  

returnId ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The unique eBay-assigned ID of the newly created return request. This field is only returned if the return request was successfully created.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#returnId)
 to learn which calls use returnId.

  

summary ( _[ReturnSummaryType](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/ReturnSummaryType.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This container consists of summarized information on the return item. This container will not be returned if the **fieldGroups** query parameter is used and its value is set to `FULL` or `NONE`.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#summary)
 to learn which calls use summary.

---

# UploadFileRequest - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

UploadFileRequest
=================

The base request type for the **POST /post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/file/upload** and **POST /post-order/v2/return/draft/{draftId}/file/upload** methods.

Call that uses UploadFileRequest:

[/post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/file/upload POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid_file_upload__post.html)

Fields
------

data ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The input for this field is a base64-encoded binary representation of the file you are uploading.  
  
For images, the system accepts BMP, GIF, JPEG, and PNG files. For shipping labels, the system accepts either an image (BMP, GIF, JPEG, and PNG files) or a PDF file.

**Note:** The **data** field supports single-time base64 encoding. For backward compatibility, the data field also presently supports double base64 encoding.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#data)
 to learn which calls use data.

  

fileName ( _[string](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#string)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This field is used to name the file that is being uploaded. Naming a file may make it easier for the buyer or seller to keep track of their files, instead of having to remember the **fileId** value (which is returned in the response) of each file.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#fileName)
 to learn which calls use fileName.

  

filePurpose ( _[FilePurposeEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/FilePurposeEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

The enumeration value supplied in this required field indicates the purpose of the file that you're uploading. One of the values defined in the [FilePurposeEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order//devzone/post-order/types/FilePurposeEnum.html)
 type definition must be used in this field.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#filePurpose)
 to learn which calls use filePurpose.

---

# DecideReturnResponse - API Reference - Post-Order API

eBay Post-Order APIVersion 2.8.0

*   [User Guide](https://developer.ebay.com/api-docs/user-guides/static/post-order-user-guide-landing.html)
    
*   [Making a Call](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/concepts/MakingACall.html)
    
*   [API Reference](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/index.html)
    
*   [Release Notes](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/ReleaseNotes.html)
    

DecideReturnResponse
====================

The base response type of the **POST /post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/decide** method.

Call that uses DecideReturnResponse:

[/post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/decide POST](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/post-order_v2_return-returnid_decide__post.html)

Field
-----

refundStatus ( _[Refund\_MoneyMovementStatusEnum](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/Refund_MoneyMovementStatusEnum.html)
_ ) [\[0..?\]](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/types/simpletypes.html#multiplicity)

This field is only returned in the response if a refund has been requested or initiated. The value in this field indicates the status of any refund action initiated through the **POST /post-order/v2/return/{returnId}/decide** request.

See the [Field Index](https://developer.ebay.com/devzone/post-order/fieldindex.html#refundStatus)
 to learn which calls use refundStatus.

---
